title: Webflow Expert
jobDescription:
Skello is a European company with one mission: reinvent shifted work through a collaborative solution which enables teams to better anticipate, organize and communicate.

​

In short, Skello is a workforce management solution for shift based workplaces that enables teams to tackle the hassle of complex scheduling. For managers, Skello optimizes work organization by helping them to make the best decisions in managing their staff costs. For employees, our tool facilitates easy and open communication and simplifies daily life.

​

Skello’s ambition is to be the number one solution for shifted work teams in Europe. To achieve this, Skello raised a €40M Series B round of financing from expert funds in the field (Partech, Aglaé Ventures & XAnge) in order to bring ever more value to our clients through new features and to open up new markets, beyond our historic industries such as hospitality, retail and health.

​

Context

​

In a context of strong growth, the Growth team aims to increase lead generation.

​

As Webflow Expert at Skello, you will deploy our strategy to optimize the performance of our websites and maximize the acquisition of new B2B customers.

​

In concrete terms, you will be in charge of implementing our Website and Conversion strategy: from the steering to the operational management of actions to the improvement and analysis of our performance.

​

Missions

​

As Website Manager, your objectives are as follows

​

  •  Build experiences and landing pages on Webflow;
  •  Define the Growth Conversion strategy and roadmap and implement it according to the business objectives of the Skello Growth team;
  •  Prioritize the requests of the different teams seeking to use the site (Team Tech, Product, Growth, Design,Talent, etc.) to always maximize the conversion rates;
  •  Establish, from qualitative studies, surveys, quantitative analysis, AB tests, opportunities to facilitate customer understanding of the Skello product;
  •  Orchestrate with the Designers and the Tech team the definition of the functional specifications of the Landing Pages and Features to be deployed;
  •  Analyze and propose optimizations of Acquisition KPIs: CPC, CTR, CPL, CAC

What this position can offer you:

​

  •  The opportunity to play a strategic and central role by working on the entry point of the business;
  •  The opportunity to contribute in a concrete way to an ambitious project that will revolutionize a very large market;
  •  Ownership and autonomy over your subjects that will allow you to learn a lot and build something you can be proud of;
  •  A stimulating, challenging and caring work environment

Qualifications

​

Soft skills

​

  •  Doer mindset: You take ownership, move fast, and focus on impact
  •  Strong communicator: You articulate ideas clearly, structure arguments effectively, and know how to convince and align stakeholders
  •  Proactive & solution-oriented: You bring ideas, challenge the status quo, and know how to drive initiatives forward

Hard Skills

​

  •  Webflow expert (or similar CMS/headless CMS): You can build and optimize high-performing websites
  •  Front-end coding skills: You know how to tweak and optimize front-end code when needed
  •  Tech & AI-savvy: You have built MVPs on Lovable, Cursor, and leverage automation, no-code, and AI daily
  •  Data-driven & experimental: You run tests, analyze insights, and iterate to maximize impact
  •  French mandatory and English fluency required

Nice to have

​

  •  Experience in a fast-growing international organization

Recruitment process

​

  •  Discovery call with the Talent team
  •  Case study and business interview with Eliott, VP Marketing
  •  3rd Vision interview with Quitterie, CEO of Skello
  •  Reference taking and offer

​

title: Conversion Rate Optimization Specialist, Web
jobDescription:
Ready to be a Titan?

​

At ServiceTitan, we empower the trades, and our digital presence is crucial to our success. We're seeking a passionate and driven Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist, Web to join our dynamic Web team. If you're highly curious and eager to dive into experimentation, optimize user experiences, and drive measurable results, this role is for you.

​

This is an exciting opportunity to shape our digital strategy, working across web, email, and paid media to maximize conversions and enhance user engagement. We're looking for someone with a solid foundation in experimentation and a desire to grow alongside a rapidly expanding company.

​

What You’ll Do:

​

​

  • You'll be instrumental in driving our experimentation efforts, identifying opportunities to improve conversion rates, and implementing data-driven strategies. You'll work collaboratively with cross-functional teams to design, execute, and analyze experiments. This role offers the flexibility to explore different areas of CRO, allowing you to develop your skills and contribute to our overall growth.
  • In practice, that means you will design, implement, and analyze A/B tests, multivariate, and personalization experiments on web pages.
  • Hypothesis Development: Develop data-driven hypotheses based on user behavior, market trends, and business objectives.
  • Data Analysis & Reporting: Utilize analytics tools (e.g., Amplitude, Google Analytics) to identify key performance indicators (KPIs), track experiment results, and generate actionable insights.
  • Collaboration & Communication: Work closely with designers, developers, and marketing teams to implement and optimize experiments.
  • Performance Monitoring: Monitor website performance, user behavior, and campaign results to identify areas for improvement.

What You’ll Bring:

​

​

  • 1-2 years of experience in a digital marketing or CRO-related role.
  • Experience running and analyzing tests on web pages, email campaigns, or paid media.
  • Familiarity with web analytics tools (e.g., Google Analytics, Amplitude).
  • Strong analytical skills and a data-driven mindset.
  • Ability to translate data into actionable insights.
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • A proactive and curious approach to problem-solving.
  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience in Marketing, Business, or a related field.

Bonus Points:

​

​

  • Experience setting up or developing experiments.
  • Familiarity with A/B testing platforms (e.g., Optimizely, VWO).
  • Knowledge of user experience (UX) principles.
  • Experience in a B2B SaaS environment.
  • Experience with behavioural analytics platforms (e.g.,Microsoft clarity, Fullstory)

Be Human With Us:

​

Being human isn’t about checking every box on a list. It’s about the experiences we have, people we meet, and the perspectives we share. So, if you have the skills but are hesitant to apply because of your background, apply anyway. We need amazing people like you to help us challenge the conventional and think differently about the problems that we’re solving. We’re in this together. Come be human, with us.

​

What We Offer

​

When you join our team, you’re not just accepting a job. You’re making a career move. Here’s how we’ll support you in doing some of the most impactful work of your career:

​

​

  • Flextime, recognition, and support for autonomous work: Flexible time off with ample learning and development opportunities to continue growing your career. We offer a comprehensive onboarding program, leadership training for Titans at all levels, and other programs and events. Great work is rewarded through Bonusly, peer-nominated awards, and more.
  • Holistic health and wellness benefits: Company-paid medical, dental, and vision for you and your dependents, RSP match, and an employee assistance program.
  • Support for Titans at all stages of life: Parental leave and support, up to $20k in adoption reimbursement, on demand maternity support through Maven Maternity, free breast milk shipping through Maven Milk, financial planning tools, and more.

At ServiceTitan, we celebrate individuality and uniqueness. We believe that the convergence of fresh perspectives and experiences from all walks of life is what makes our product and culture so great. We strongly encourage people from underrepresented groups to apply. We do not discriminate against employees based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity or expression, age, disability, pregnancy (including childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical condition), genetic information, protected military or veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state or local laws.

​

ServiceTitan is committed to fair and equitable compensation for all of our employees. We thoughtfully consider a wide range of factors when determining individual compensation. The expected salary range for this role for candidates residing in Canada is between $71,100 CAD - $106,700 CAD. Actual compensation for an individual may vary depending on skills, performance over time, qualifications, experience, and location. In addition to the base salary, the total compensation package also includes an annual bonus, equity and a holistic suite of benefits.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
jobDescription:
Digital Marketing Manager – Drive Growth, Optimize Performance, and Make an Impact!

Are you passionate about SEO, digital marketing, and conversion optimization? Do you thrive in data-driven environments where your insights directly impact lead generation and business growth? If so, we have the perfect opportunity for you!

As Digital Marketing Manager, you will join our Growth Marketing team and will play a pivotal role in shaping our online presence, optimizing website performance, and driving high-intent organic traffic. Working within a multi-disciplinary marketing team of 16, you’ll have the opportunity to craft creative solutions that fuel our marketing pipeline and maximize conversion rates.

What You’ll Do:

  • Supercharge SEO & Organic Growth – Leverage internal SEO tools (BrightEdge) and collaborate with the web development team to enhance organic traffic and optimize conversion rates for more than 1.2m web visitors per annum.
  • Optimize Lead Generation & Business Intelligence – Work with Growth Marketing & Business Development to refine marketing tactics that generate high-quality leads.
  • Solve Marketing Challenges Creatively – Collaborate with the Senior Digital Marketing Manager to develop innovative strategies that boost pipeline and engagement across all digital channels.
  • Monitor & Improve Website Health – Analyze and enhance website performance, ensuring seamless user experiences and strong conversion paths.
  • Bridge Field & Digital Marketing – Support in-person marketing initiatives by implementing digital tactics that extend audience reach and engagement.
  • Design, develop and execute campaigns - Support the Growth marketing team to launch campaigns that generate qualified pipeline.
  • Maximize our industry leading martech stack - Help Percona realize the true value of our amazing tech stack, including 6Sense, HubSpot, SalesForce, TypeForm, BrightEdge, Foleon, Unbounce and more…

What You Have Done:

  • SEO & SEM Expertise – You understand search algorithms, keyword strategy, and organic growth tactics like the back of your hand. Experience using BrightEdge will be very beneficial.
  • Marketing Tech Savvy – Experience with marketing automation (HubSpot preferably), ad serving platforms and analytics tools to optimize digital performance.
  • Creative Problem Solver – You love tackling marketing challenges and finding data-backed solutions to improve conversion rates.
  • Effective Communicator & Collaborator – You can work cross-functionally with teams and external contractors to drive initiatives forward.
  • Self-Starter Mindset – You take ownership of projects, work independently, and continuously optimize for success.

What Will Make You Stand Out:

  • Proven results in SEO & CRO – You’ve optimized web content, landing pages, and conversion funnels for measurable growth.
  • Certifications & Experience – Bonus points for credentials in SEO, GA4, Google Ads, and marketing automation platforms.
  • Eye for Design & User Experience – You understand how to create high-converting landing pages and CTAs that drive engagement.
  • A Passion for Innovation – You love experimenting with creative digital marketing solutions to drive better results.

Why Join Us?

At our company, you’ll be part of a forward-thinking marketing team that values creativity, collaboration, and continuous learning. We empower our team to take ownership, experiment, and drive real impact in digital growth.

If you’re excited about optimizing digital experiences, growing organic reach, and solving marketing challenges, we’d love to hear from you!

Apply now and let’s build something amazing together!

Why Percona?

At Percona, we believe an open world is a better world. Our mission is to enable everyone to innovate freely, by providing the best open source database software, support, and services. We make databases and applications run better through a unique combination of expertise and open source software built with the community for you. Our technical teams are experts in MySQL, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and MariaDB.

Percona is proud to be a remote-only and globally dispersed workforce – we have colleagues in more than 50 countries! We offer a collaborative, highly-engaged culture where your ideas are welcome and your voice is heard.

Our staff receives generous benefits including flexible work hours and various paid time off programs, all your equipment for your remote office, funds for career development (external training, certifications, conferences), ongoing connectivity allowances, and the opportunity to participate in our equity incentive plan. We also have benefits that support a healthy work/life balance such as The Percona Adventure Team, Work-from-Anywhere, FlowDays, FryDays, and overall flexibility. We also support being socially responsible through our PAVE volunteering program and Women Transforming Technology.

If you love the idea of working with a high-growth tech company that is one of the best in the business and known globally as a leader in the open-source database space, let’s talk!

Connect with us and stay up to date on our latest news and developments by following us on LinkedIn and Twitter. We look forward to connecting with you!

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobDescription:
Full job description

OBJECTIVE OF POSITION

​

We are seeking a results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our growing marketing team. This role is responsible for managing Durabuilt’s online presence, executing digital marketing campaigns, optimizing online visibility, and leveraging data analytics to drive engagement and conversion. The ideal candidate will have a strong understanding of digital marketing tools, SEO, PPC, social media, and email marketing strategies. This role requires managing multiple brands under the Durabuilt umbrella and effectively executing marketing strategies across multiple audiences.

​

SKILLS FOR SUCCESS

​

Technical Skills:

​

Proficiency in Google Analytics, Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, and SEO tools.

Experience with website CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress, Webflow) and marketing automation tools (e.g., Salesforce, Mailchimp).

Strong knowledge of paid advertising, social media marketing, and conversion optimization.

Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or other graphic design tools.

Ability to build and design websites from scratch.

Soft Skills:

​

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Excellent communication and copywriting abilities.

Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects.

Key Competencies:

​

Strategic thinking and data-driven decision-making.

Attention to detail and ability to manage deadlines.

Adaptability to evolving digital trends and technologies.

Ability to manage marketing efforts across multiple brands and audiences.

ACCOUNTABILITIES

​

Digital Strategy & Execution:

​

Develop and execute multi-channel digital marketing campaigns to drive brand awareness, lead generation, and sales.

End-to-end lead generation, including audience targeting, creative asset development, deployment, landing page creation, form connectivity, tracking, and biweekly reporting. This also includes full funnel management to optimize lead conversion.

Ensure digital marketing efforts align with brand positioning across multiple brands under Durabuilt.

SEO & Website Management:

​

Implement SEO best practices to improve search rankings and organic traffic.

Build and design websites, ensuring optimal user experience and performance.

Collaborate with developers and designers to enhance website UX and functionality.

Monitor and analyze website traffic, user behavior, and conversion rates using Google Analytics and other tools.

Paid Advertising & PPC:

​

Plan and manage paid digital campaigns across Google Ads, Facebook Ads, LinkedIn, and other platforms.

Track and optimize ad performance to maximize ROI.

Conduct A/B testing to improve ad performance and targeting.

Social Media & Content Marketing:

​

Manage Durabuilt’s online presence across social media platforms, ensuring brand consistency and engagement.

Create engaging content and implement strategies to increase audience engagement.

Develop and execute social media advertising campaigns.

Monitor trends and stay updated on industry best practices.

Email Marketing & CRM Management:

​

Develop and execute email marketing campaigns to nurture leads and drive conversions.

Segment audiences and personalize email communications for better engagement.

Utilize CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce) for lead management and automation.

Graphic Design & Visual Content:

​

Design high-quality graphics for digital campaigns, social media, websites, and print materials.

Ensure brand consistency across all digital assets and marketing materials.

Collaborate with internal teams to develop compelling visuals for campaigns and promotions.

Analytics & Reporting:

​

Track KPIs and provide insights on campaign performance.

Generate reports on digital marketing effectiveness and recommend improvements.

Use data-driven insights to refine marketing strategies.

EDUCATION / CERTIFICATION

​

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Digital Marketing, Communications, Graphic Design, or a related field..

EXPERIENCE / CAPABILITIES

​

Experience: Minimum of 5+ years of experience in digital marketing, preferably in a B2B or manufacturing environment

SEND US YOUR RESUME!

​

Why Join Us?

​

Work in a collaborative and innovative environment.

Opportunity to drive meaningful impact through digital initiatives.

Competitive salary, benefits package, and professional growth opportunities.

How to Apply:

If you’re a digital marketing expert looking for an exciting opportunity to make an impact at one of Canada’s leading window and door manufacturers, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience and qualifications.

​

We embrace diversity and offer equal opportunities to all qualified applicants regardless of origin, culture, ethnicity, age, ability, gender identity, sexual orientation, or faith. Thank you to all those apply and those who are short-listed will be contacted.

​

Job Type: Full-time

​

Pay: $75,000.00-$95,000.00 per year

​

Benefits:

​

Casual dress

Dental care

Extended health care

Life insurance

On-site parking

Paid time off

Vision care

Flexible language requirement:

​

French not required

Schedule:

​

Day shift

Monday to Friday

Ability to commute/relocate:

​

Edmonton, AB: reliably commute or plan to relocate before starting work (required)

Work Location: In person

title: Graphic/UI-UX Designer
jobDescription:
Expert Graphic/UI-UX Designer – High-Impact Ecommerce Role

Location: Remote (U.S. Preferred)

Type: Contract with Full-Time Potential

Working Hours: 9am-6pm CST (No Exceptions) 

Compensation: $25–$45/hour (DOE) + Full-Time Conversion Opportunity

About MIRA Safety

At MIRA Safety, we protect people from the worst threats imaginable. Their lives are in our hands when it comes to some of the most demanding environments. As a worldwide recognized brand specializing in premium safety equipment, we're raising the bar in how people interact with our life-saving products. To continue this mission, we need a world-class creative mind to drive design that directly increases revenue, brand engagement, and customer loyalty.

Position Overview

We are seeking a truly elite Graphic and UI/UX Designer — someone who isn't just "good" but world-class at what they do.

This isn’t a role for someone who "dabbles" in Canva. This is a high-leverage position where your creative decisions will directly impact millions in annual revenue.

We need a rare talent who can seamlessly combine beauty and performance across:

  • Landing Pages that convert cold traffic into loyal customers
  • Spec Sheets that transform technical information into intuitive, persuasive visual storytelling
  • Static Ads for paid media campaigns (Meta, Google, TikTok, etc.)
  • Email Creatives that command attention and drive high open and click rates
  • Thumbnail Designs that immediately grab attention and boost CTR across channels
  • Amazon A+ Content that drives conversions and reinforces brand authority
  • Unique Value Proposition (UVP) Product Images that sell benefits, not just features

​

You’ll own the visual experience of our key campaigns, working closely with our marketing and product teams.

If you are a designer who can think like a marketer, you will absolutely thrive here.

What You’ll Be Responsible For

  • UI/UX: Rapidly designing beautiful, high-performing landing pages with a focus on CRO (conversion rate optimization)
  • Spec Sheets: Producing visually compelling, on-brand technical sheets for a variety of product lines
  • Ad Creatives: Building thumb-stopping static ads and high-converting thumbnails
  • Email Visuals: Designing polished, eye-catching creative assets for email marketing
  • Brand Consistency: Enhancing and evolving our visual identity across ecommerce, email, and paid media
  • Performance Focus: Iterating based on A/B testing, conversion metrics, and user behavior
  • Creative Autonomy: Making strategic creative decisions without needing constant hand-holding

Must-Have Qualifications

  • 4+ years of hands-on professional experience in both Graphic Design and UI/UX Design
  • Mastery of Figma, Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), and landing page builders
  • Strong portfolio showcasing high-converting landing pages, static ads, product spec sheets, and email creatives
  • Deep understanding of ecommerce psychology, buyer journeys, and conversion principles
  • Ability to translate  marketing briefs into emotionally compelling, revenue-driving designs
  • Comfort working in a fast-paced, high-growth environment where results matter
  • Self-driven, organized, and able to manage multiple high-priority projects at once
  • Fluent English communication skills (written and verbal is a MUST)

Bonus Points If You Have

  • Experience in ecommerce, safety gear, tactical, or military product industries
  • Knowledge of HTML/CSS (helpful but not required)
  • Experience working with Shopify, Klaviyo, and ad platforms (Meta, TikTok, Google)
  • Knowledge of CRO best practices for landing pages and email marketing

​

Why Work at MIRA Safety?

  • Your designs won’t just look good — they’ll move the needle for a brand that saves lives.
  • High ownership: We respect creatives here. No micromanagement.
  • Full-time potential: Prove yourself, and there’s a direct path to a full-time offer.
  • Team of A-players: You'll be surrounded by high-performing marketers, operators, and creatives.
  • Make real impact: You won’t be a cog in a machine — your work will be seen, felt, and measured

To Apply

If you feel this describes you perfectly, submit:

  • A short introduction highlighting why you’re a fit
  • A link to your best portfolio pieces (especially ecommerce landing pages and ads)
  • Your resume
  • Submit your Culture Index: https://go.cultureindex.com/p/z5KUA7BSeVLFeJhcw 

Important: If you’re not obsessed with design that drives results, this role is not for you.

We are not looking for “safe” designers who are looking for unique opportunities to build their resume— we want creative assassins who want their work to dominate.

title: Junior Webflow Developer
jobDescription:
Company Description

CloudEagle helps finance, operations & IT teams save on software spend and helps streamline the renewal and buying process. We have helped several companies like Iceye, Wefunder, Armory save 10-30% on their software spend and hundreds of hours renewing and buying apps. We offer a money-back guarantee, in the rare case that we are not able to save on spend, we refund our fees back to the customer.

​Job Description

CloudEagle is hiring a Webflow Developer to build and manage our marketing web properties. You will work closely with our Marketing team to create high-quality web experiences focusing on conversion goals, page performance, and responsive design. You’ll work closely with our team to produce engaging online experiences for our leads and customers.

​Responsibilities

  • Work with in-house designers and the marketing team to develop web pages and landing page concepts.
  • Monitor site performance and run regular audits.
  • Measure conversion, traffic, bounce and more, and provide directional suggestions to the team.
  • Make innovative interactive concepts in Webflow using your observations and learning
  • Collaborate with content, design and product teams.
  • Research the latest trends and keep track of innovations in the space.
  • Understand buyer journey, persona and blockers based on scroll depth, click patterns and path analysis.

Preferred Skills

  • 6 months to 2 years in a full-time creative environment as a webflow developer.
  • Expertise in web design fundamentals, including typography, color, layout, accessibility, and responsive design, and the ability to follow brand guidelines and prioritize brand consistency across web spaces
  • Experience with design tools such as Figma, Sketch, Adobe Suite, etc.
  • Understanding of SEO, including knowledge of backlinking, keyword rankings and constant upkeep with ever-changing SEO trends.
  • Expertise in evolving web standards and best practices
  • Experience with user testing, A/B testing, and collecting/reporting data
  • Expertise in Google Analytics, and Google Tag Manager and social and external platform tracking (pixels, events, and tracking scripts)
  • Proficiency with Web Applications and programming languages such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
  • Expertise in responsive layouts
  • Exceptional technical problem-solving skills and the ability to follow deadlines.
  • Excellent portfolio demonstrating successful website design and development with a focus on brand and marketing sites.

title: SEO Manager
jobDescription:
iPullRank is a ten-year-old digital marketing remote agency based in New York City, founded by industry trailblazer Michael King. We’re not here to follow trends—we set them. Our team blends technical expertise with creativity to deliver SEO, Content, and Generative AI services that drive results. We work with some of the biggest names across eCommerce, Financial Services, and Media brands, as well as ambitious mid-sized businesses, crafting strategies that don’t just compete but dominate.

Our Values: PROUD

At iPullRank, we live by our values:

  • Proactive: We don’t wait for problems—we solve them.
  • Reliable: When we commit, we deliver.
  • Outstanding: We aim for extraordinary, every time.
  • Useful: Everything we do has purpose and impact.
  • Dedicated: Your goals are our mission.

These principles shape every decision, every campaign, and every success story.

What We Do

We specialize in SEO, Content, and Generative AI strategy and implementation, helping brands win today while building future-proof strategies for tomorrow. Whether it’s cracking complex algorithms, crafting authentic, helpful content, or engineering AI solutions, we’re the partner brands trust to stay ahead.

Why Join Us?

At iPullRank, we’re more than an agency—we’re a team of thinkers, builders, and creators who believe the best ideas come from everywhere. We foster a culture where you’re encouraged to grow, take ownership, and make a real impact. We’re small enough to be nimble but big enough to work with global heavyweights like Rocket Mortgage, American Express, Nordstrom, Warner Music Group, Target, and Adidas.

We care about our people and back it up with competitive salaries, benefits, and opportunities to evolve into the marketer, content creator, SEO, or leader that you want to be. When you work with us, you’re not just filling a role—you’re shaping your career and redefining what’s possible in marketing.

If you’re ready to take on meaningful work with a team that challenges and inspires, we’d love to hear from you.

Position Description

iPullRank is looking for a Search Engine Optimization Manager to join our team to perform site auditing, keyword research, competitive analysis, log file audits, backlink audits, and to help with content marketing and client reporting. The SEO Manager is a master of all things Google with a technical mindset and an understanding of how Organic Search plays with the rest of the marketing mix. The client-facing role works directly with Client teams to deliver best-in-class SEO that drives results. This person will lead SEO efforts and collaborate extensively with The Director of SEO and Mike King to actively contribute to SEO research to develop new strategies and with the SEO community. This role may be hybrid or remote. Salary range: $80,000-$95,000.

What You'll Do

  • Proactively identify SEO opportunities and generate data-driven insights
  • Perform comprehensive Site Audits and prioritize recommendations
  • Perform in-depth log file analysis
  • Improve conversion of Organic Search traffic
  • Own performance monitoring reports and KPIs
  • Configure SEO tools for automated tracking
  • Work with Content Strategy to determine content and link building opportunities for client sites
  • Work with Analysts to perform Persona-Driven Keyword Research
  • Perform competitive analysis to identify actionable insights
  • Present deliverables and results to clients
  • Work with Development and Content Creation teams to implement SEO processes
  • Review algorithm updates to develop thought leadership content
  • Contribute to new business through iPullRank inbound marketing efforts and research for new business pitches

Requirements

  • Minimum 5 years of search engine optimization experience
  • Possess thorough, up-to-date knowledge of search engine ranking factors and maintains current SEO practices
  • Previous client-facing experience
  • Proficiency with HTML, CSS required
  • Working knowledge of JavaScript and relevant frameworks such as React, and Angular preferred
  • Proficiency with Analytics packages and Google Search Console
  • Familiar with industry-standard SEO software
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office or Google Workspace applications: Excel and PowerPoint or Sheets and Slides
  • Strong analytical mindset and skills, excellent critical thinking and problem-solving skills
  • Exceptionally clear oral and written communication skills
  • High level of initiative and work well in a team environment
  • Experience working in an agency environment or other role managing multiple competing projects and deadlines

Benefits

  • Competitive salaries commensurate with experience
  • 100% Medical, Dental, and Vision insurance
  • 3 weeks of vacation
  • Paid sick days and holidays

​

title: UI/UX Designer
jobDescription:
An opportunity has arisen for a UI/UX Designer to join our User Experience team in Nicosia. The UI/UX Designer role is about crafting user-friendly, visually engaging interfaces for web applications. It involves conducting user research, developing wireframes and prototypes, and collaborating closely with developers and stakeholders to bring designs to life. This role also focuses on maintaining a cohesive design system, incorporating feedback, and ensuring accessibility in all digital experiences.

Key responsibilities include:

  • User Interface Design: Create visually appealing, user-friendly interfaces for web applications that align with TSYS brand with strong focus on user experience.
  • Wireframing and Prototyping: Develop wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs using tools like Figma to effectively communicate design ideas.
  • Collaboration: Work closely with the designers, developers, and stakeholders to ensure designs are feasible and align with business goals.
  • Development Handoff: Prepare all design works for proper development handoff and collaboration. Work closely with developers to make sure design requirements are clearly executed.
  • Design Systems: Create, maintain and evolve the company's design system to ensure consistency across all web applications.
  • Feedback Implementation: Gather feedback from users and team members to iterate on designs for continuous improvement.
  • Accessibility: Ensure all designs comply with web accessibility standards to provide an inclusive experience for all users.

Essential Requirements:

  • Typically 2+ years relevant experience in designing web applications.
  • Proven experience with a strong portfolio showcasing previous UI/UX web applications design work.
  • Technical Skills: Proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Axure, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), and other UI design tools.
  • Problem-Solving Skills: Ability to solve complex design challenges creatively while considering user needs and business objectives.
  • Communication Skills: Excellent verbal and written communication skills to articulate design concepts and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

The following skills would be advantageous:

  • Knowledge of HTML/CSS: Basic understanding of front-end technologies to effectively communicate with developers.
  • User Experience Research: Conduct user research and usability testing to understand user needs and behaviors, and use insights to inform design decisions.
  • Familiarity with payment technologies and trends in the fintech space.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment typical of tech companies like TSYS, which emphasizes agile development practices.
  • Knowledge of responsive design principles to ensure applications work seamlessly on various devices.

Other requirements:

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in a related field (e.g., Computer Science, MIS, Human-Computer Interaction) and/or combination of relevant training and/or experience in lieu of degree.
  • Excellent spoken and written English communication skills.

TSYS offers structured career development, supported by training that provides the opportunity to learn and develop.

In addition to a competitive salary, you’ll have access to an excellent benefits package, including:

  • Private medical insurance for you and your family, non-contributory, in and out patient cover
  • A well-established, strong provident fund
  • Life insurance (3x base salary)
  • 21 days’ holiday increasing with length of service, plus 14 public / bank holidays
  • Flexible working (hybrid model – part from home, part from office)
  • Wellbeing initiatives with access to support services
  • On-site subsidised canteen
  • Modern offices opposite the Mall of Cyprus with gym and showers, games room (pool table, table tennis, darts, table football, play station) & prayer/meditation room
  • Store discounts
  • Regular social events and charitable initiatives to give back to our community.

​

Global Payments Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. Global Payments provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, ancestry, age, marital status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, disability, veteran status, genetic information or any other basis protected by law. Those applicants requiring reasonable accommodation to the application and/or interview process should notify jobs@globalpay.com.

​

To apply for this position, please visit our website www.globalpayments.com/about-us/careers and apply through the online system. All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence.

title: Web Designer
jobDescription:
Full job description

Position: Web Designer

​

Location: Edmonton, Alberta, Canada

​

Workplace: Hybrid. This position requires on-site work at our office for a minimum of 3 days a week. We will not accept applications from candidates seeking fully remote positions. (Please plan for full-time in-office for the first 4-6 weeks for onboarding and training)

​

​

No recruiters, please!

​

We are looking for a Web Designer to be a part of Lift’s growing Nimble Digital team!

​

​

About

​

Lift is a leading digital marketing agency located in Edmonton, Canada. As a part of our Nimble team, you will be a part of the team that offers cost-effective websites and ongoing digital marketing programs to clients across Western Canada.

​

​

Nimble offers a smarter, carefree solution to digital marketing. The Nimble approach helps clients to better understand their business and their customers, unleashing the best way to engage with their audience.

​

​

As a Nimble Web Designer, you will apply established branding and imagery to new website projects, select page layouts using custom-designed, conversion-optimized templates, and collaborate with the marketing team members and other web team members to ensure project objectives are being met. The ideal candidate will be comfortable with Frontend Development and have an eye for clean and artful web design.

​

​

Duties & Responsibilities

​

​

Develop sitemaps based on client needs

Conceptualize page layouts that promote simplicity and user friendliness

Create and interpret site maps to communicate layout and content structure

Implement brand based on design guidelines, best practices and standards

Design engaging and responsive landing pages

Follow and adhere to the Nimble website building process, employing industry and design best practices throughout

Liaise with marketing and web team members to ensure project timelines and client expectations are being met

​

Requirements & Qualifications

​

Minimum 1-4 years of experience working with a team or agency in web design and front-end development

Experienced with Webflow as a primary tool for the delivery of websites

Deep understanding and experience with WordPress; front-end page builders, woo-commerce, and hosting environments

Familiarity with Shopify

Experienced with Figma or similar design and wireframe program

Experience building wireframes, and sitemaps

Understanding and experience in HTML, CSS and JavaScript for rapid prototyping

Basic understanding of SEO and web traffic metrics

Critical thinker; ability to solve problems creatively and effectively

Excellent multitasking and time-management skills

Ability to work with a team and independently

Able to assimilate quickly into a fast-paced team environment

Up-to-date with the latest web trends, techniques and technologies

​

We’ll Take Care of You

​

As an employee of Lift, you’ll be well taken care of with benefits that include:

​

​

Competitive compensation rates

Feedback and coaching with regular check-ins and reviews

Extended health and dental benefits including an annual Health Spending Account

RSP Employer Matching Program

A strong emphasis on work-life balance

Opportunities for education and training

​

Our Hiring Process

​

First Meet & Greet: We’ll have a conversation to learn more about you and your passions.

Formal Interview: We’ll dive into your experience, skills, and how you approach project and team management.

Offer: If you’re the right fit, we’ll make an offer and work out the details together.

​

Join Our Team

​

We value diversity and inclusion in our workplace. We strive to create an environment where individual differences are celebrated, talents are nurtured, and everyone can thrive. This commitment extends throughout the hiring process and employment journey.

​

​

Apply now!

title: Web Designer – Remote
jobDescription:
Geek Powered Studios is an Austin-based, full-service digital marketing agency, and we’re looking for a Web Designer to join our team! We design, build, and service in-house, so you'll work on a variety of projects—from full site builds and landing pages to banner ads, newsletters, and social ad creatives.

​

This role starts as part-time with the potential to go full-time based on performance and business needs. You'll need to be strong in your design skills, comfortable with development, graphic design, and video editing, and an expert at Webflow with the ability to flex to WordPress and Shopify when needed.

​

We work collaboratively on most projects, so being a team player is a must—but you should also be able to work independently and meet deadlines without constant oversight.

​

What You’ll Do:

Design and develop custom Webflow sites with modern UX/UI best practices.

Work on Shopify and WordPress projects, including theme customization, site optimization, and functionality enhancements.

Build landing pages, website components, banner ads, and email templates.

Create high-quality social media ads and promotional videos for campaigns.

Ensure responsive design, cross-browser compatibility, and site performance optimization.

Collaborate with our SEO, development, and marketing teams to create high-performing websites and digital assets.

Stay up-to-date on design trends, UX/UI best practices, and CRO strategies.

​

What We’re Looking For:

Strong portfolio with at least 4 relevant projects (websites, ads, and video work).

Expert-level skill in Webflow with WordPress and Shopify capabilities

Experience with Figma, Adobe Creative Suite and other design tools.

Intermediate to advanced understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Experience creating social media ad graphics and short-form marketing videos.

A solid grasp of typography, layout, and design principles.

Ability to manage deadlines, work independently, and collaborate with multiple stakeholders.

Experience with CRO (conversion rate optimization) best practices.

Agency experience preferred.

Must be physically located in the U.S. and able to work as a W2 employee (no sponsorship available).

​

What’s In It For You?

As a part-time Geek you are eligible for:

100% remote work

Flexible schedule after 90 days

Opportunities for professional development & team building

Medical, retirement and other benefits are available should the role become full-time.

​

Sound like you? Apply now and send us your portfolio with strong web design, ad, and video examples—we want to see what you can do!

title: Webflow Developer
jobDescription:
Softermii (https://www.softermii.com/) is an outsourcing/outstaffing company with more than 8 years of experience in web and mobile application development with a team of more than 120 specialists from 6 countries.

​

We have withstood multiple challenges, such as COVID-19 pandemic and war aggression against Ukraine, we have secured sustainable development processes, saved all our projects and jobs. Even more – we’re constantly growing.     

 

Every day we add new project to our portfolio in the following areas of expertise:

  • Healthcare
  • Real estate
  • Livestream E-commerce
  • Fintech (WealthTech, Capital Trading)
  • Real Time Communications (RTC)

 

In addition, we develop 2 of our own solutions that help our customers get faster applications for video or audio calls (https://www.softermii.com/solutions/vidrtc) or an application for real estate with 3D visualization

(https://www.softermii.com/solutions/apartmii)

 

Company’s mission:

Softermii: Succeed Without (L) imitations

We will turn any idea into a valuable product.

 

Our plans as a company:

We want to move from a regular outsourcing business to an ecosystem of outsourcing, education and product development companies.

 

Project:

Is a global platform provider offering premium and customized products with full-service solutions to iGaming operators. Our goal is to ensure our partners and players always experience the highest-quality journey and unsurpassed level of satisfaction. 

 

Type of cooperation: Part-time cooperation, remote

​

About the role:

We are seeking a talented Webflow Developer to join the Milliorize team and play a crucial role in designing, building, and maintaining websites with excellent UI, design performance, and content management.

This role will work closely with our Marketing team to bring our brand to life through high-quality web experiences focusing on conversion goals, page performance, and responsive design. You’ll work closely with our team to produce engaging online experiences for our customers, potential customers, and the iGaming community.

In this role, you will be expected to create and maintain industry-leading, scalable, and fast website infrastructure with a commitment to design quality. Strong typographic and layout skills are essential.

We’re looking for a webflow developer who thinks technically, someone who can design and build delightful web experiences while ensuring web standards and maintaining efficient infrastructure for functionality and performance.

This role will require in-depth knowledge and experience with Webflow.

​

​

️Your responsibilities on the project will be:

- Design & develop software;

- Refactor, improve and optimize code;

- Troubleshoot and debugging application code;

- Participate in all phases of the development lifecycle;

- Collaboration with the team.

​

​

You can be part of the following team: Marketing team (Head of Marketing, Illustrator, Content Writer)

​

Tools we use: Jira, Confluence, Git, Figma

 

Our requirements to you:

- 3+ years in a full-time creative environment as a web developer, whether in-house, agency, or freelance;

- In-depth knowledge and experience with Webflow;

- Expertise in web design fundamentals, including typography, color, layout, accessibility, and responsive design, and the ability to follow brand guidelines and prioritize brand consistency across web spaces;

- Experience with design tools such as Figma, Adobe Suite, etc;

- Expertise with SEO, including strong knowledge of keyword rankings and constant upkeep with ever-changing SEO trends;

- Experience with Google Analytics, and Google Tag Manager;

- Expertise in evolving web standards and best practices;

- Experience with user testing, A/B testing, and collecting/reporting data; 

- Proficiency with Web Applications and programming languages such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, JQuery, and APIs;

- Expertise in responsive layouts;

- Exceptional technical problem-solving skills and the ability to follow deadlines and execute under pressure;

- Extensive understanding of when and how to properly backlink;

- Excellent portfolio demonstrating successful website design and development with a focus on brand and marketing sites;

- Proactive attitude towards driving continuous improvement, embracing challenges, and seizing opportunities;

- Self-motivated with a can-do attitude, enthusiasm, and energy to go above and beyond to achieve goals;

- Knowledge of the iGaming and Casino industry;

- Strong intermediate (written and spoken) level English. (B1+)

​

​

‍Who will you have the opportunity to meet during the hiring process (stages):

Portfolio Review, Call, HR, Tech interview, Final interview.

​

What we can offer you:

  1. We have stable and highly-functioning processes – everyone has their own role and clear responsibilities, so decisions are made quickly and without unnecessary approvals. 
  2. You will have enough independence to make decisions that can affect not only the project but also the work of the company.
  3. We are a team of like-minded experts who create interesting products during working hours, and enjoy spending free time together.
  4. Do you like to learn something new in your profession or do you want to improve your English? We will be happy to pay 50% of the cost of courses/conferences/speaking clubs.
  5. Do you want an individual development plan? We will form one especially for you + you can count on mentoring from our seniors and leaders.
  6. Do you have a friend who is currently looking for new job opportunities? Recommend them to us and get a bonus.
  7. And what if you want to relax? Then we have 21 working days off.
  8. What if you are feeling bad? You can take 5 sick leaves a year.
  9. Do you want to volunteer? We will add you to a chat, where we can get a bulletproof vest, buy a pickup truck or send children's drawings to the front.
  10. And we have the most empathetic HRs (who also volunteers!). So we are ready to support your well-being in various ways.

 

A little more information that you may find useful:

  • our adaptation period lasts 3 months, this period of time is enough for us to understand each other better;
  • there is a performance review after each year of our collaboration where we use a skills map to track your growth;
  • we really have no boundaries in the truest sense of the word – we have flexible working day, remote or office is up to you.

 

Of course, we have a referral bonus system. So if you have a friend who likes our job opening, you can give us their telegram contact, and we in turn will thank you with a bonus if we start working with them!

title: Content Marketing Manager
jobDescription:
At CloudZero, we believe that exceptional content is a key driver of pipeline growth. We're looking for a skilled Growth Marketing Manager with a focus on content to expand and optimize our content engine, drive inbound engagement, and adapt to the evolving digital landscape, especially with AI reshaping SEO and organic search.

Responsibilities:

  • Develop creative briefs, scripts, and content for various formats and platforms.
  • Own SEO best practices and stay ahead of AI-driven changes in search strategies.
  • Manage the end-to-end content pipeline, from ideation to distribution. 
  • Responsible for the creation of 20+ high-quality pieces of new and refreshed content monthly through collaboration with internal and external teams.
  • Actively promote and distribute new content to maximize its reach and impact, with a focus on social platforms.
  • Ensure content aligns with our brand and style guidelines through meticulous writing and editing.
  • Speak to both technical and non-technical audiences across the marketing funnel.
  • Track and report on performance, showcasing impact with KPIs such as inbound traffic and social engagement.
  • Stay curious and explore new channels, tactics, and tools to attract and engage our audience.

Qualifications:

  • 3-5 years of experience in content marketing.
  • BA in Marketing or a related field.
  • Exceptional project management skills. 
  • Proficient in a CMS (WordPress preferred, but experience with HubSpot, Sanity, Webflow, Drupal or similar is great too).
  • Strong understanding of SEO and experience using tools like Ahrefs, Semrush, etc.

It would be a bonus if you have:

  • Video production or some design experience (Figma, inDesign, Illustrator).
  • An interest in dev tools and engineering.
  • Other experience in marketing practices, like growth, demand gen, or operations.

Equal Opportunity Employer

CloudZero is an equal opportunity employer and values diversity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status or disability status. All job offers are contingent upon the candidate passing background and reference checks.

Applicants must be authorized to work for ANY employer in the United States. We are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment Visa at this time.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist
jobDescription:
Do you want to unleash your vision and creativity on a massive scale? Join Creator Warehouse, the creative force behind lttstore.com and products for our YouTube tech channels like Linus Tech Tips (LTT), ShortCircuit, TechLinked, and more. Bring your innovative and unique ideas to life, make an impact, and see your work in the hands of over 16 million tech enthusiasts worldwide!

As the Digital Marketing Specialist, you will be responsible for developing and executing strategies to drive brand awareness, customer engagement, and online sales. You will manage the marketing calendar and optimize Creator Warehouse advertising campaigns. If you’re always ahead of the curve in identifying opportunities, risks, and industry trends across various platforms, this is the perfect role for you.

As the Digital Marketing Specialist, your responsibilities include, but are not limited to, the following:

Duties:

  • Support management of the team's comprehensive marketing strategies to drive brand awareness and customer engagement
  • Manage all content marketing efforts, including internal marketing calendar, product and website content, blogs, social media, and email marketing.
  • Implement SEO and SEM strategies to improve organic search rankings and website visibility
  • Analyze campaign performance using Google Analytics, HubSpot, and other data tools to drive weekly internal recaps for digital marketing performance and ROI
  • Manage and execute all product launches through developing timelines, coordinating product shoots, content creation and product launch plans for all LTTstore sites
  • Present findings and build consensus internally and externally, equipping our team with holistic decision-making

Job Requirements

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, or a related field.
  • 3 years of experience in digital marketing or related roles.
  • Collaborative with a strong analytical mindset and communication skills to work cross-functionally with other Linus Media Group and Creator Warehouse teams.
  • High proficiency in digital marketing tools such as Google Analytics, and Microsoft Office Suite.
  • Customer-oriented with strong judgment skills and attention to detail and accuracy
  • Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and manage multiple competing demands

Compensation:

For this position, the typical hiring salary range falls between $60,000 and $80,000 CAD per year. The base pay is based on market location and may vary depending on job-related qualifications such as knowledge, skills and experience. Base pay is one part of the Total Package that is provided to compensate and recognize employees for their work, and this role may be eligible for additional discretionary bonuses/incentives.

Job Perks

  • Paid Time Off - Paid personal leave as well as vacation time.
  • Employee Wellness - Flexible schedules, frequent game nights, and exciting company outings.
  • Phone Plan - We provide a comprehensive phone plan for our employees.
  • SWAG - Access to swag from lttstore.com, tech, and other goodies.
  • Group Retirement Savings Plan - A generous employer matching plan for your retirement.

Equal Opportunity Statement

Creator Warehouse (CW) is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, colour, ancestry, place of origin, religion, family status, marital status, physical disability, mental disability, sex, age, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, political belief, or conviction of a criminal or summary conviction offence unrelated to employment.

At CW, we’re committed to building a workforce that is representative of the audiences we create for, by building a culture where everyone feels like they belong.

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent

Pay: $60,000.00-$80,000.00 per year

Benefits:

  • Dental care
  • Extended health care
  • On-site parking

Schedule:

Ability to commute/relocate:

title: Marketing Communications Coordinator
jobDescription:
The Marketing Communications Coordinator is designed to bridge the gap between marketing and sales through strategic communication efforts. This role emphasizes conducting marketing projects that align with sales objectives, developing marketing and sales opportunities, executing events, and maintaining public relations, ensuring consistent representation of our brand voice across multiple channels.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and implement strategic communication plans to support marketing and sales objectives.
  • Coordinate with freelancers and in-house media designers and web designers to ensure our brand voice is consistently and effectively represented across all channels.
  • Assist in the planning and execution of promotional events and outreach campaigns, tracking engagement and effectiveness.
  • Collaborate with the team to leverage our Marketing Technology stack for broader brand voice propagation.
  • Send off marketing email blasts in support to our organization.
  • Coordinate the creation and maintenance of marketing collateral, ensuring alignment with brand messaging and timelines for content release across all channels.
  • Analyze market trends and consumer demands to tailor marketing strategies that resonate with our target audience and generate leads.
  • Oversee the hands-on implementation of our social media strategy, making sure that it is effectively implemented, outsourcing resources as needed, tracking engagement, and adjusting tactics to enhance overall marketing effectiveness.
  • Creation of written content for our marketing collaterals.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in communications, Business Administration, or a relevant field.
  • Strong experience in marketing or communication, with a preference for candidates who have event planning experience.
  • Proven ability to develop and execute marketing and communication strategies.
  • Excellent written and oral communication skills, with the ability to create compelling content for diverse audiences.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills, with the capability to multitask and manage multiple projects simultaneously.
  • In-depth knowledge of the industry and current marketing practices, with a keen eye for identifying and adopting emerging trends.

Hard skills

  • Familiarity with Canvas and similar template-based fast design solutions.
  • Experience with Project Management.
  • Hands-on experience with email marketing automation.
  • Strong Familiarity with excel and spreadsheet manipulation.
  • Great communication skills, both written and spoken.
  • Tech savviness.
  • Experience with content creation for LinkedIn and Instagram.
  • Excellent written English skills.
  • French fluency is an asset.
  • Zoho-One experience is an asset.

Soft skills

  • Loves social media
  • Emotional intelligence.
  • Deep curiosity.
  • Awareness of patterns.
  • Empathic and attentive.
  • Openness to learning and feedback.
  • Interpersonal relationship skills.
  • Strong work ethic.
  • Results ownership.
  • Accountability.

Education & Experience

  • Extra curricular experiences on campus will be a huge plus.
  • Loves social media and has an active account in Tiktok, LinkedIn and/or Instagram.
  • Certificates and experience in social media management is highly appreciated.
  • Current studies, degrees or postgraduate qualifications in any communication or business-related course are beneficial. Experience is highly valued.
  • Connection with student executive background is appreciated.

Once on the job, training is a combination of self-learning and mentoring by a colleague. In addition, we will provide support and access to professional development, as people working in interactive media need to keep their skills and knowledge up to date.

Navacord, and all our Broker Partners are actively committed to supporting diversity, equity, and inclusion. We serve and recognize and respect human differences and similarities.
