title: Project Manager
jobDescription:
Wonderist Agency is a full-service marketing agency that supports almost 1000 dentists around the country. We pride ourselves on ditching the old fashioned marketing model of stock photos and templated sites. We strive to tell our clients’ stories with bespoke brands, impactful photo and video shoots, and stunning website design (Here is a great example of our work: www.precisiondentalbowlinggreen.com )

We need a skilled Project Manager with the flexibility to turn on your heels when priorities change, the thoughtfulness to do what’s in the best interest of the team, and the desire to always produce your best work. 

We’re a team of over 55 passionate marketers nestled in sunny San Diego. We are walking distance from local hangouts, bars, and the famed Liberty Station. While many companies simply check the required boxes when it comes to culture, a well-balanced team and positive office culture has been the core of our success from the start. We are a social team at heart, and that is one constant that hasn’t changed with all the movement this economy and industry has seen. We have embraced a hybrid work model where local team members come in at least two days a week. This allows us to work from home and have flexibility, without altogether forgoing the excitement and moments of collaboration and inspiration you can only get from in-person time. Not to mention, we also genuinely enjoy spending time together and socializing.

We celebrate new ideas and prioritize a culture of trust and respect where team members can grow and take risks. Each quarter we host events under our four cultural pillars; health & wellness, personal & professional development, social good, and social. We are proud to have been named one of San Diego Business Journal’s Best Places to work in 2018, 2021, 2022 and 2023, made the Inc 5000 Regionals Fastest Growing Companies 2021 and 2022, made the San Diego Business Journal’s Fastest Growing Private Companies list in 2019, 2020, 2022, and 2023 and made the Inc. 5000 for the last 5 years! 

If you work at Wonderist, you likely enjoy a challenge, appreciate autonomy, actually care about clients, and are looking for a team that you can enjoy being part of.

Job Description:

The heart of a Project Manager’s role is driving clients’ happiness and helping them meet their business goals. You will take ownership of client accounts from onboarding through the entire project phase, before handing off clients to our Client Success Managers. In this role as a Project Manager, you will shape the ideas of the project, define clear goals and objectives in consultation with other departments, organize notes and key assets, all while keeping the project on a set timeline. The Project Manager is expected to create an environment that maintains a balance between allowing the creative talent freedom to explore ideas, while still making sure the team meets deadlines and creates strong project deliverables, requiring excellent interpersonal and organizational skills.

As Project Manager, you will shoulder the responsibility of not just launching projects, but launching them with precision and strategic insight. Your role involves cultivating intentional strategies and nurturing relationships to fortify client retention, enthusiasm and collaboration during the project phase. Given that project management's impact extends across our entire array of services, your agility as a team player becomes pivotal to seamless collaboration.

Essential Functions

  • Project Management: You will move Branding, Website, Creative Collateral, and Photo & Video projects forward, both internally with our team and externally with our clients, trafficking deliverables and feedback. You will manage project schedules, communicate timelines and expectations, collect and organize assets, prioritize tasks, and ensure deadlines are met. Throughout various projects, you will routinely QA designers’ and web developers’ work to guarantee quality and also provide creative direction as needed. 
  • Client Communication: You will be your clients’ primary point of contact, functioning as a liaison between them and our team. You’ll lead onboarding calls with clients, be a master note-taker, and maintain a consistent communication cadence with clients. You will be responsible for maintaining the most up-to-date information about our clients within Zoho CRM & Monday.com, notifying other departments of any changes to their account or business.
  • Customer Service and Client Retention: You will field any client questions or requests, troubleshooting issues to the best of your knowledge and/or escalating them to the appropriate team members when necessary. Your goal is to ensure long-term satisfaction and development of client relationships.
  • Quality Assurance and Creative Direction: You ensure that all our work is branded appropriately for each client, accurate, and high-quality. From guiding feedback on print collateral to reviewing websites or ad copy, you will always strive to dot every i and cross every t, before delivering work to a client.
  • Marketing Strategy: Identify opportunities and goals for clients and match those opportunities with the best strategies to meet their needs. In addition to coming up with your own marketing ideas, and working with local sales reps on feasibility and execution, you should feel confident presenting recommendations to our clients.
  • Upsells and Expansions: Drive upsells and expansion opportunities by understanding client goals and proactively sharing with them services that may help them achieve those goals.
  • Agent of Positive Change: You will help to identify workflows and processes that can better and escalate the areas of improvement through the proper channels.

Core Competencies

  • Intuitive Communication: You will be a client’s primary point of contact and responsible for relaying updates to our team; you must be personable, professional, responsive and well-organized. There is an intuition needed in this role to differentiate between moments when an email will suffice and when you need to pick up the phone.
  • Obsessive Attention to Detail: Project Managers guide feedback and traffic projects between clients and team members. You will share accountability for the accuracy and quality of our company’s work. Attention to detail is crucial, but so is the ability to read between the lines. Being able to interpret client feedback, ask qualifying questions and make sure our clients’ voices are heard is critical to the success of any project.
  • Expert Organization and Project Management: If someone asks you to describe yourself and you wouldn't say "organized," you need not apply. Project Managers must be organized and on top of all client needs, acting as the project owner to oversee deadlines and facilitate deliverables. You will need an exceptionally strong ability to multitask and prioritize accordingly, keeping track of outstanding assets and tasks.
  • Understanding of Digital Marketing: You will be responsible for piloting the handoff between Project Management and Client Success and taking detailed notes to ensure a streamlined transition. Throughout your clients’ scoped projects, you must also become familiar with their practice’s growth goals and service focus areas, in order to make sound recommendations during the handoff phase, so that our clients can ground running with marketing services. Websites should be optimized properly for SEO, PPC, Funnels, and Social Media, which is the Project Manager’s job to oversee and verify that our final project deliverables are conversion-focused. 
  • Resourceful and Confident Self-Starter: Once you learn the ropes, we’ll expect you to own your accounts to keep projects moving forward. You will need to take the initiative to make decisions and recommendations, and to follow up with clients to progress projects and maintain successful relationships. Your ability to launch projects in a timely manner and troubleshoot any roadblocks preventing a timely launch, will have a direct impact on MRR. You will solve problems every single day, so we need someone with a solutions-oriented mind.
  • Takes Pride In Work: We need someone who takes any project, big or small, and puts everything they have into it. Mistakes are okay. Sloppiness is not.

Personality Musts:

Our perfect fit is someone who is a problem solver who understands the difference between “yes, and…” and “yes, but…”. You should be a hungry, scrappy personality with a positive attitude and aims to deliver. Working in the client service industry can mean going the extra mile, and we need someone who is always willing to rise to the occasion for our clients and strives to put forward beautiful work that exceeds client expectations. Someone who is detailed and organized, driven and displays vigor and comes ready to play every day. Confidence, self-discipline, and a congenial, curious mind are things we love and admire.

Minimum Qualifications:

  • 1+ years of marketing or agency experience
  • Experience working in Monday.com or similar project management software
  • A passion for helping clients and small businesses succeed
  • Knowledge of Webflow CMS or other like web development software

Bonus Points for Applicants With…

(if you don’t have these but are organized and want to learn, we want to hear from you!)

  • Account management experience in agency setting
  • DNS/Domain management experience
  • Knowledge of dental industry or dental services

​

title: Senior Product Designer, Acquisition & Activation
jobDescription:
Full job description

About Us

​

Circle Medical is the fastest-growing telemedicine provider in the US and has seen incredible growth of over 100% per year over the past three years.

​

Circle Medical is a venture-backed Y-Combinator healthcare startup on a mission to bring quality, delightful primary care to everyone on the planet. Built by top-tier physicians, engineers, and designers, our medical practice and underlying technology have pioneered how people find and receive care.

​

More about us can be found on our website.

​

Description

​

We are currently looking for a Senior Product Designer to join the Patient Experience, Acquisition & Activation team at Circle Medical Technologies. As we continue to grow, we are constantly searching for exceptional talent to be a part of our team. This position may be based out of our office in Montreal, Quebec.

​

The ideal candidate is optimistic, curious, and hard-working, driven to optimize the acquisition and activation journey for new patients. You’ll focus on helping potential patients understand the value of Circle Medical, seamlessly book their first appointment, and feel confident and supported as they prepare for their initial experience.

​

Success in this role requires the ability to craft intuitive, engaging designs that simplify complex user flows and effectively communicate design decisions and goals. From prototyping and user testing to refining interactions and user interfaces, you’ll play a critical role in driving growth and activation. If you’re passionate about leveraging your full range of design skills to make a meaningful impact on patient access and care, this opportunity is for you.

​

An online/digital portfolio is required as part of the application process for this position.

What You Will Do

Clarify design goals, map user flows, prototype interactions, and test with users.

Collaborate with engineers to ship polished products that meet design standards.

Design delightful flows, interactions, and visuals.

Utilize both qualitative and quantitative data to inform design decisions.

Iterate quickly on key product features in a fast-paced environment.

Provide design support for business, sales, marketing, and other teams.

What You Will Bring

4+ years of experience in product design.

Demonstrated experience owning a product and/or core product features.

Proven ability to work directly with product managers, engineers, and executives to ship and iterate on products.

Strong background in end-to-end product design, including web and mobile landing pages and applications.

Advocacy for the end-user within an organization.

Expert-level proficiency in Figma.

Lo-fi and hi-fi prototyping skills.

Expertise in user research and interviewing techniques.

Strong analytical skills for extracting insights and evaluating design solutions.

Experience working on conversion rate optimization (CRO) and tools like GrowthBook, Google Analytics.

Ability to produce pixel-perfect UI designs and work within design systems.

What Will Give You an Edge

Familiarity with Low-Code/No-Code tools like Webflow and WeWeb.

Experience in branding, photography, and video production.

Excellence in designing marketing assets and interactive experiences.

Proven track record with other startups or VC-funded companies.

COMPENSATION

​

In alignment with our values, Circle Medical has transparent salaries based on location, output levels, and options to trade cash for stock.

​

This is a full-time, salaried position, with an annual salary (cash and stock combined) of $92,000- $115,000 CAD plus generous vacation, full medical/dental benefits.

​

Additional Benefits:

Flexible vacation & generous sick leave after 90-days

Paid bonus holidays in addition to local statutory holidays

$500 annual education and development reimbursement

RRSP matching through WealthSimple

Medical, Dental, Vision, Disability & Life insurance benefits for eligible Employees, enhancing local provincial coverage (eligibility after 90-days)

EAP with Inkblot therapy by GreenShield Health

Weekly in-office team lunches in Montreal!

​

Circle Medical is an equal-opportunity employer and affirmatively seeks diversity in its workforce. Circle Medical recruits qualified applicants and advances in the employment of its employees without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, disability, genetic information, ethnic or national origin, marital status, veteran status, or any other status protected by law.

​

====================================

​

À PROPOS DE NOUS (About Us)

​

Circle Medical est le fournisseur de télémédecine qui connaît la croissance la plus rapide aux États-Unis et a enregistré une croissance incroyable de plus de 200 % par an au cours de chacune des deux dernières années.

​

Circle Medical est une entreprise de technologie de santé en démarrage financée par Y-Combinator dont la mission est d’apporter des soins primaires de qualité et agréables à tous les habitants de la planète. Bâtie par des entrepreneurs, des ingénieurs, des concepteurs et des médecins de haut niveau, notre logiciel de télémédecine a été pionnier dans la façon dont les gens trouvent et reçoivent des soins.

​

Notre volonté de construire directement pour nos patients et nos prestataires afin de répondre aux graves problèmes d'accessibilité aux soins nous a permis de multiplier par trois notre croissance d'une année sur l'autre. Nous utilisons actuellement notre dernière levée de fonds auprès de WELL Health, soutenu par Sir Li Ka-shing, pour continuer à développer notre modèle hybride de soins en clinique et de télémédecine dans les cinquante États américains.

​

Pour en savoir plus sur nous, consultez notre site web.

​

DESCRIPTION

Nous recherchons actuellement un(e) Designer Produit Senior pour rejoindre l'équipe Expérience Patient, Acquisition et Activation chez Circle Medical Technologies. Alors que nous continuons de croître, nous sommes constamment à la recherche de talents exceptionnels pour rejoindre notre équipe. Ce poste peut être basé dans nos bureaux de Montréal, Québec.

​

Le/la candidat(e) idéal(e) est optimiste, curieux(se) et travailleur(se), motivé(e) par l’optimisation du parcours d'acquisition et d'activation des nouveaux patients. Vous vous concentrerez sur l’aide aux patients potentiels pour comprendre la valeur de Circle Medical, réserver leur premier rendez-vous en toute simplicité, et se sentir confiants et soutenus en préparation de leur première expérience.

​

Réussir dans ce rôle nécessite la capacité de concevoir des designs intuitifs et engageants qui simplifient les flux d’utilisateurs complexes, tout en communiquant efficacement les décisions et objectifs de conception. Du prototypage et des tests utilisateur à l’affinement des interactions et interfaces utilisateur, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la croissance et l’activation. Si vous êtes passionné(e) par l'idée de mettre à profit l’ensemble de vos compétences en design pour avoir un impact significatif sur l'accès des patients aux soins, cette opportunité est faite pour vous.

​

UN PORTFOLIO EN LIGNE EST REQUIS POUR POSTULER.

​

Fonctions et responsabilités essentielles:

Clarifier les objectifs de conception, cartographier les parcours utilisateurs, prototyper les interactions et tester avec les utilisateurs.

Collaborer avec les ingénieurs pour livrer des produits finis conformes aux normes de design.

Concevoir des parcours, des interactions et des visuels attrayants.

Utiliser des données qualitatives et quantitatives pour éclairer les décisions de conception.

Itérer rapidement sur les principales fonctionnalités du produit dans un environnement dynamique.

Fournir un support en design aux équipes commerciales, de vente, de marketing et autres.

​

Compétences requises:

Compétences en prototypage basse fidélité (lo-fi) et haute fidélité (hi-fi).

Expertise en recherche utilisateur et techniques d'entretiens.

Solides compétences analytiques pour extraire des insights et évaluer des solutions de conception.

Expérience en optimisation des taux de conversion (CRO) et utilisation d’outils comme GrowthBook, Google Analytics.

Capacité à produire des designs d’interface utilisateur (UI) pixel-perfect et à travailler au sein de systèmes de design.

Maîtrise experte de Figma.

​

Qualifications et expérience:

Plus de 4 ans d'expérience en design produit.

Expérience avérée dans la gestion d’un produit et/ou de ses fonctionnalités principales.

Capacité démontrée à collaborer directement avec des chefs de produit, ingénieurs et dirigeants pour livrer et itérer sur des produits.

Solide expérience en conception de produits de bout en bout, incluant des pages d’accueil web et mobiles ainsi que des applications.

Défense active des intérêts de l’utilisateur final au sein d’une organisation.

​

Ce qui vous donnera un avantage:

Familiarité avec les outils Low-Code/No-Code comme Webflow et WeWeb.

Expérience en branding, photographie et production vidéo.

Excellence dans la conception de supports marketing et d’expériences interactives.

Succès avéré avec d’autres startups ou entreprises financées par des VC.

​

Exigences physiques:

Périodes prolongées assis(e) à un bureau et travaillant sur un ordinateur.

​

RÉMUNÉRATION (Closing)

En accord avec nos valeurs, Circle Medical offre des salaires transparents basés sur des niveaux de production fondés sur le mérite, et notre rémunération totale comprend des options d'achat d'actions.

​

Il s'agit d'un poste salarié à temps plein avec une fourchette de salaire annuel de $92,000 to $115,000, ainsi que de généreuses prestations de vacances et de santé.

​

D’autre Avantages

Vacances flexibles et congés de maladie généreux après 90 jours

Congés payés en plus des jours fériés locaux

Remboursement annuel de 500 dollars au titre de la formation et du développement

Assurance médicale, dentaire, vision, invalidité et vie pour les employés éligibles, en complément de la couverture provinciale locale (éligibilité après 90 jours)

Avantages liés au bien-être, y compris des réductions pour des programmes de santé mentale et des cours de bien-être en ligne

Déjeuners d'équipe hebdomadaires au bureau!

​

Circle Medical est un employeur qui souscrit au principe de l'égalité des chances et qui recherche activement la diversité au sein de son personnel. Circle Medical recrute des candidats qualifiés et fait progresser ses employés sans tenir compte de la race, de la couleur, de la religion, du sexe, de l'orientation sexuelle, de l'identité sexuelle, de l'expression sexuelle, de l'âge, du handicap, de l'information génétique, de l'origine ethnique ou nationale, de l'état civil, du statut d'ancien combattant ou de tout autre statut protégé par la loi.

title: Senior SEO Specialist
jobDescription:
As an Senior SEO Specialist, you’ll drive organic visibility, traffic, and conversions for a diverse range of clients across industries. You’ll own SEO execution from research to reporting—using AI-powered tools to uncover insights, optimize content, and improve search visibility. Working closely with creative teams, your work will help position our clients as standout, forward-thinking leaders in their space.

‍

Designity is a Creative-as-a-Service (CaaS) platform that empowers businesses with a flexible, high-quality, and scalable alternative to traditional agencies and in-house teams.

‍

Our unique model connects marketing and creative leaders with the top 3% of US-based creative and marketing talent, all led by experienced Creative Directors, Project Managers, and Marketing Strategists. Through our collaborative platform, we streamline the creative process, ensuring fast, high-impact execution without the inefficiencies of hiring in-house or the high costs of traditional agencies.

‍

Brands like Calendly, Kung Fu Tea, and Marriott Hotels trust Designity to handle their design and marketing needs—proving that there's a better way to scale creativity. Unlike in-house hiring, which is expensive and skill-limiting, or marketplaces like Upwork and Fiverr, which lack reliability and creative oversight, Designity delivers a seamless, results-driven approach that makes creative collaboration effortless.

‍

PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Create and execute SEO strategies for clients, targeting high-value keywords and opportunities based on real-time data.
  • Collaborate with writers and designers to develop content that ranks and converts.
  • Run technical audits to identify site issues, improve performance, and ensure compliance.
  • Track performance across traffic, rankings, and conversions and optimise where needed.
  • Use AI tools to increase efficiency from keyword clustering and content scoring to SERP analysis, forecasting, and automated reporting.
  • Support link-building efforts through outreach, partnerships, and digital PR campaigns that build authority and drive relevance.

REQUIREMENTS

  • 5+ years of hands-on SEO experience with clear wins in traffic growth, keyword ranking, and conversion improvement across B2B or B2C brands.
  • Proficient with tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush and familiar with technical SEO best practices, including page speed, structured data, and CMS management (WordPress, Webflow, etc.).
  • Experienced in integrating AI into SEO strategy and performance analysis.
  • Comfortable explaining strategy and results to both creative and technical stakeholders in a clear, no-jargon way.
  • Highly organized, fast-moving, and confident managing multiple SEO campaigns with shifting priorities and deadlines.

BENEFITS:

  • Join a company at the perfect moment! Career making opportunity.
  • Work fully remotely full-time, from wherever you are.
  • Unwind during the flexible PTO, and company holidays.
  • Learn and grow with the best by becoming part of our exclusive Design Community.
  • Enjoy dedicated focus times designed to boost your productivity and creativity.
  • ‍

In order to be considered for this position, you need to complete the application process at www.designity.com/careers/senior-seo-specialist

‍

Please do NOT follow up on your application. We will be in touch within 2-3 weeks if you're qualified.

‍

At Designity, employment decisions are based on business needs, qualifications, and merit. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer, valuing diversity in culture, perspectives, skills, and experiences, which strengthens our team, clients, and products.

​

title: Senior Social Media Manager
jobDescription:
Wonderist Agency is a full-service marketing agency that supports almost 1000 dentists around the country. We pride ourselves on ditching the old fashioned marketing model of stock photos and templated sites. We strive to tell our clients’ stories with bespoke brands, impactful photo and video shoots, and stunning website design. We also provide ongoing services such as SEO, PPC, Social Media Marketing, and Funnels to help our practices get butts in seats. (Here is a great example of our work: www.strahlerdentalpartners.com)

We need a skilled Senior Social Media Manager with the flexibility to turn on your heels when priorities change, the thoughtfulness to do what’s in the best interest of the team, and the desire to always produce your best work. 

We’re a team of over 60 passionate marketers nestled in sunny San Diego. We are walking distance from local hangouts, bars, and the famed Liberty Station. While many companies simply check the required boxes when it comes to culture, a well-balanced team and positive office culture has been the core of our success from the start. We are a social team at heart, and have embraced a hybrid work model where team members come in at least two days a week. This allows us to work from home and have flexibility, without altogether forgoing the excitement and moments of collaboration and inspiration you can only get from in-person time. Not to mention, we also genuinely enjoy spending time together and socializing.

We celebrate new ideas and prioritize a culture of trust and respect where team members can grow and take risks. Each quarter we host events under our four cultural pillars; health & wellness, personal & professional development, social good, and social. We are proud to have been named one of San Diego Business Journal’s Best Places to work in 2018, 2021, 2022 and 2023, made the Inc 5000 Regionals Fastest Growing Companies 2021, 2022, and 2024, made the San Diego Business Journal’s Fastest Growing Private Companies list in 2019, 2020, 2022, and 2023 and made the Inc. 5000 for the last 4 years! 

If you work at Wonderist, you likely enjoy a challenge, appreciate autonomy, actually care about clients, and are looking for a team that you can enjoy being part of.

Job Description:

The Senior Social Media Manager is a strategist first. They will work to build, maintain, optimize and evolve our clients’ social media accounts while serving our clients in all their social media needs. This role requires proficient technical skill across platforms, exceptional communication and interpersonal skills to build and retain client trust, a versatile design aesthetic that can adapt to a variety of clients, and an appetite for leadership and fostering the growth of junior level team members. We’re looking for candidates who eat, sleep and breathe social media, and are eager to share and implement their industry knowledge for our clients at scale. 

As a Senior Member of the team, you will demonstrate exceptional proficiency in managing a portfolio of clients at scale, utilizing seasoned efficiency and expertise to ensure seamless delivery and client satisfaction. You'll shoulder the responsibility of not just launching and managing clients, but doing so with precision and strategic insight. Your role involves cultivating intentional strategies and nurturing relationships to fortify client retention. The Social Content team’s impact extends across our entire array of services, so your agility as a team player becomes pivotal to seamless collaboration. As a Senior Social Media Manager, you will support junior team members with their client accounts, initial onboarding and ongoing training.

Essential Functions:

  • Post & Plan: Develop timely and engaging content, including original copy, optimized for platforms and intended audience, and aligned with both social-specific and larger marketing strategies. Content needs to align with client goals, in order to build trust and ensure client satisfaction. 
  • Design Content: Create beautiful, stand out posts through Canva and Photoshop that are in line with the client’s overall brand aesthetic.
  • Conduct Client Interviews: From kickoff calls to interviews used to garner authentic content, you’ll need to ask the right questions, get clients comfortable in front of the camera, and listen for quality soundbites that make for engaging content. 
  • Build & Nurture Client Relationships: This is a client-facing role. You will need to feel comfortable building and nurturing client relationships with consistent, timely communication. This includes showing clients that you possess a deep understanding of their practice to ensure posts are on-brand. 
  • Inter-Departmental Collaboration: Particularly the Client Success Managers, but also other departments to ensure a holistic approach and unified front across marketing campaigns. 
  • Analyze, Track, and Measure Performance: Report on monthly Social Campaigns to refine, define, and improve our clients’ social media marketing performance. Track client metrics to gain insights into the success of accounts. When accounts need work, you’ll provide account analysis and suggest optimizations to get things back on track.  
  • Keep Up to Date with the Latest Social Trends & Tools: Possess an in-depth understanding of social media platforms, best practices, and emerging trends, and leverage those trends for social campaigns, adapting them to the dental industry. 
  • Utilize, Track and Manage Budgets: You’ll have multiple clients with varying budgets and campaigns, so organization is key.
  • Internal Mentorship, Training & Team Support: You’ll support the Head of Content in ongoing training of peers, junior team members, and cross-departmentally. You will be a resource in process development, campaign strategy and ideation, as well as client communication support to help maintain team performance.
  • Expanded Leadership Role: We want all Social Media Managers to exhibit leadership and a high level of initiative, but expect Senior Social Media Managers to be major contributors to department initiatives. ‍
  • Highly Efficient Client Management: Senior Social Media Managers are expected to achieve higher efficiency in their workflow, enabling them to handle a higher client load.

Core Competencies:

  • Critical Thinker: An instinct for spotting social opportunities in client niches and creating stories that will make people notice.
  • Social Media Guru: Passion for social media by staying up-to-date with new platforms and current trends.
  • Adaptable Aesthetic & Design Eye: The ability to appropriately apply various design and photography elements through Photoshop and Canva to create beautiful content that’s in line with the clients’ brand. 
  • Platform & Software Proficiency: Have a high proficiency for social platforms including Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Google My Business, and YouTube; a working knowledge of softwares including Canva and Photoshop; and experience with third party posting platforms, like Sprout Social. 
  • Exceptional Communicator: Exceptional professional written and verbal communication skills are necessary to this client-facing role.  
  • Client Management Skills: Ability to effectively manage a large volume of client accounts, balancing urgent client needs with the day to day workload. 
  • Meticulous Attention to Detail: The nature of Social Content requires a meticulous attention to detail. We all make mistakes, but sloppiness will not be tolerated. 
  • Agile Problem Solver: Able to work under tight deadlines and be able to handle multiple projects at any given time.
  • Natural Strategist: Approach client accounts at the campaign level and consider their other marketing efforts within Wonderist Agency to ensure a unified message across all channels. 
  • Expert Organization and Project Management: Highly organized and on top of all client needs, you’ll be expected to manage your time and workload to facilitate deliverables and hit deadlines. You will need an exceptionally strong ability to multitask and prioritize accordingly, keeping track of outstanding assets and tasks. 
  • Keen Analytical Eye: Deep understanding of social metrics and KPIs, along with the ability to dissect and solve problems through data. You will monitor your clients’ campaign performance and course correct through knowing when a strategy is working vs. not and being able to scale accordingly. 
  • Resourceful and Confident Self-Starter: Once you learn the ropes, we’ll expect you to own your tasks and hold yourself accountable. You will solve problems every single day, so we need someone with a results-oriented mind.
  • Forward Thinker With Fresh Ideas: Social media platforms are constantly changing, which means you’ll need to take the time to research these changes and develop new ways we can advance our clients’ performance. Our team’s innovation is what makes Wonderist stand out from the competition.‍
  • Ability to Embrace Wonderist Agency’s Company Culture: Takes pride in work and is committed to being an agent of positive change.

Minimum Experience:

  • 5+ years of marketing or agency experience OR equivalent 
  • 5+ years of prior Social Media Manager experience
  • Verifiable examples of successful social media marketing campaigns
  • Proficiency in Facebook, Instagram, Facebook Insights, Google Analytics

Personality Musts:

Our perfect fit is a problem solver who understands the difference between “yes, and…” and “yes, but…”. You should be a hungry, scrappy personality with a positive attitude who aims to deliver. Working in the client service industry means going the extra mile. We need someone who is always willing to rise to the occasion and put forward beautiful work that exceeds client expectations. Someone who is detailed, organized, driven, displays vigor, and comes ready to play every day will fit in well. Confidence, self-discipline, and a congenial, curious mind are things we love and admire. 

Bonus Points for Applicants With:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in marketing, communication, or related field
  • Photography and/or design background
  • Experience in software such as Canva, Sprout Social, Monday.com, G Suite, Webflow 
  • Knowledge of the dental industry

If we just described you...

Please apply with your resume, cover letter, and portfolio.

title: Web Designer
companyName: Growth Media North America, Inc / Kinetica Print
jobDescription:

title: Web Designer (CRO + Webflow)
jobDescription:
About Fella & Delilah

Fella & Delilah is the direct-to-patient clinic for busy families in Middle America to get to a healthier weight.

Fella is optimized for busy bigger guys who want a no-nonsense solution to getting healthier. Delilah is built for strong women in their prime who want a sustainable solution to feel their best.

We use affordable, effective weight loss medication to solve our customers’ most pressing healthcare need, then aim to remain their core healthcare provider for the rest of their life — expanding to hormonal health, mental health, longevity, and primary care.

GLP-1 medications are a f*ing big deal. We’re in a remarkable & rapid period of change which will radically reshape the patient & cash flows in the healthcare system.

Our mission is to accelerate the global take-up of GLP-1 medications among busy families to help solve obesity worldwide. From this, we’ll become the world’s leading consumer healthcare brand.

We’ve grown >1000x since Aug 2021, >200x since Aug 2022, >20x since Aug 2023. We’ve just surpassed $70M ARR. As a company, we’ve been cashflow positive for the last 21mo. We’re fast approaching 21,000 active subscribers with high NPS.

Almost all of this has so far been through Fella. Delilah is still very new and your job is to make her soar.

We’re a young startup and we’re just getting started. This is still Day 1 and all our work is ahead of us.

You can read more about working at Fella & Delilah here: Working at Fella & Delilah https://fella.notion.site/Working-at-Fella-Delilah-14a2ac8575d34d148d009bb410387af4

We're backed by top healthcare & consumer investors:

  • Y Combinator
  • Global Founders Capital — backed Facebook, Slack, LinkedIn, Revolut, Rocket Internet
  • AngelList Early Stage Fund (backed by Naval Ravikant)
  • BrandProject (venture-builder behind 2 unicorns)
  • The founders of Indeed, Curative (unicorn), Alan (unicorn), Kaia Health (>$300mil valuation), Vouch Insurance (>$500mil valuation), Not Boring (Packy McCormick)

Being a Web Designer at Fella & Delilah

As a Web Designer at Fella & Delilah, you’ll design and develop high-converting landing pages and quiz funnels (Mostly using webflow). This role is focused on execution, not brand creation — you’ll be implementing visual assets into performance-first designs that directly impact results. You’ll work closely with our CRO Specialist, Frontend Engineer and Lead Designer to create landing pages that can be adapted across multiple brands. While we currently use Webflow as our primary platform, we’re also exploring a move to Shopify or other platforms — so being able to implement front end code and use no-code tools at the same time is important .

You’ll receive fast, direct feedback and will be expected to iterate quickly. We’re looking for someone who can move fast, take ownership, and consistently deliver high-converting pages.

Over time, you'll become a key player in the development of new customer journeys, working hand-in-hand with the rest of the team to create designs that significantly improve our Lead > Sale conversion rate.

This is a full-time remote role.

You'll report directly to our Lead Designer (@Marjoe Bacus), CRO Specialist (@Oreoluwa Akinnawo Akinnawo), work closely with Frontend Engineer (@Art), Head of Growth (Dave Lane) & CEO (Richie Cartwright).

Key Responsibilities

  • Straight away
  • Design for core conversions
      1. Collaborate: Work closely with the design team and the CRO Specialist to understand the optimization roadmap and identify design opportunities across funnels.
      2. Design+Build: Create visually appealing and user-centric designs, focusing on improving page layouts, visual hierarchy, and calls to action to lift conversion rates.
    1. Iterate: Based on test results and insights from the CRO Specialist, iterate on designs to further optimize performance and implement winning variants across the site.
    • Enhance design systems for testing - Develop and maintain design components and templates that facilitate efficient testing and ensure consistency across the site.
  • In the near future
    • Expand design's impact on the customer journey - Collaborate with the Ore, our CRO Specialist to design optimized experiences beyond the site, including ads, email, and product flows. You'll create visually compelling and persuasive designs that influence core KPIs e.g. CAC & LTV.

Need to Have

  • Design expertise: 3+ years of experience designing high performing landing pages and websites. for existing brands and startups (not template work) and a portfolio that showcases this. Skilled in creating visually compelling and user-centric designs that effectively guide users towards desired actions.
  • Proficiency in design and web development tools: Strong command of design tools such as Sketch, Figma, or Adobe Creative Suite. Proficient in implementing designs using Webflow.
  • Full funnel design perspective: Understanding of how design impacts the entire customer journey, from awareness to retention. Ability to create cohesive and persuasive experiences across touchpoints.
  • Collaboration skills: Proven ability to work closely with Design, CRO, Product, Marketing, and Engineering teams to understand optimization goals and translate them into impactful designs.
  • Attention to detail: Meticulous in ensuring design consistency, adhering to brand guidelines, and maintaining design systems across the site and various touchpoints.

Nice to Have

  • Previous experience with CRO: Familiarity with conversion rate optimization principles and techniques in relation to design. Experience designing for A/B and multivariate tests is a strong plus.
  • Storytelling through design: Skilled at using visual design to communicate complex ideas and guide users through narratives that drive conversions.
  • Adaptability: Thrives in a fast-paced environment. Able to quickly iterate on designs based on changing requirements and new insights. Experience with Shopify and other no-code tools and graphic design skills are a plus.

Our cultural standards

These are the core cultural standards to which we hold ourselves & our team-members at Fella:

  • Belief in the mission: We will have served 10 million patients by the end of 2028 and we transform the life of most patients who join. We have a lot of work to do. We are obsessed with our patients and are dedicated to the mission.
  • Unwavering integrity: We are at the frontier, so we often live in ambiguity with no trodden path. When we can’t look to others for guidance, we must maintain impeccable ethics and unwavering integrity.
  • Only the paranoid survive: Bad sh*t is coming. By joining us, you’re choosing to sail straight towards the storms with unhesitating conviction. However much we’ve already done, however far we’ve already come — it’s still Day 1 and all our work is ahead of us.
  • Your life’s work: This will be your most challenging, most rewarding role of your life. You’ll be shocked how capable you are & how much you can achieve.
  • If we’re average we fail: We are only interested in “insanely great”, a focus on the quality of our execution that in everyday life would be considered pathological. We have a dedication to excellence and reject incompetence.
  • Commitment to candor: That which can be destroyed by the truth should be. You get full transparency from the company and the company expects full transparency from you. We never say anything about someone that we wouldn’t say to them directly. We give feedback with love and do not need to protect people from fleeting physical sensations.
  • A maniacal sense of urgency: We execute at an intensity that most people think is impossible. Speed is critical and we need things done yesterday. We all work very hard and in such a competitive world there really is no other way to win.
  • Enduring frugality: We are frugal. We hate being wasteful and we are anti-luxury. A culture of cheapness keeps us young. We spend our cash wisely & carefully — in a way that would make our grandmas proud.
  • Bulldozing barriers: The world is malleable and we shape it. We truly believe this and act accordingly. We are relentlessly resourceful and are at the mercy of no-one but ourselves.
  • Keep your head down: We’re boring people doing exciting work. We don’t chase short-term status — we ignore short-term dopamine hits and focus on what matters. Outsiders will underestimate us and we revel in that.
  • The power of focus: We live in a world of power laws and we cannot overestimate the unimportance of practically everything. Know your One Thing, and nail it.

🎯 “You just build a fing amazing experience. Make each step amazing. Make every decision in the long term interest of the customer. Give the customer massively more value than you take.”*

Compensation & Benefits

  • Compensation: $30k-$60k/yr inc equity
  • Healthcare: comprehensive medical insurance (if appropriate)
  • Vacation: PTO with a yearly minimum (≥2wks/yr + local national holidays)
  • Remote: our team is fully distributed across the world and functions fully remotely
  • Personal development: budget for books, courses, coaching
  • Personal wellness: budget for gym, health apps
  • Coaching: free biweekly health coaching
  • Equipment: Macbook & work-from-home equipment provided as needed
  • What are we missing? We're still early so you get to shape our culture.

How to apply

Apply via Ashby and be sure to include the following:

  • your resume & portfolio
  • highlights from your experience relevant for the role

​

title: Webflow Developer
jobDescription:

​

Ready to elevate our digital presence? Apply now!

title: Graphic & UX/UI Designer (Webflow Specialist)
jobDescription:

Portfolio Requirement

Applicants must provide a portfolio showcasing Webflow projects that they both designed and launched. Applications submitted without a relevant portfolio will not be considered.

title: Online-Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
jobDescription:
Always strive for the best – Wir bei BrandLift bauen Marken und Online-Plattformen für die bedeutendsten Lebensbereiche wie Gesundheit, persönliche Weiterentwicklung und Finanzen. Unser Ziel ist es, über digitale Medien, E-Learning-Inhalte und Produkte der besten Experten ihrer Bereiche an ein breites Publikum zu vermitteln. Jedes Projekt wird vom Fundament des Markenaufbaus bis zum zufriedenen Endkunden von uns entwickelt und mitgestaltet. Welt- und deutschlandweit bekannte Marken wie Wim Hof, Florian Homm und Christian Bischoff vertrauen auf die Expertise des BrandLift-Teams. Als Teammitglied bei BrandLift hast du die Möglichkeit, all deine Fähigkeiten mit einzubringen und dein eigenes Potenzial vollends zu entfalten.

Aufgaben

Was dich begeistert

Eigenverantwortung: Du bist verantwortlich für die Entwicklung und Umsetzung einer umfassenden Online-Marketingstrategie, die auf die Unternehmensziele abgestimmt ist.

Performance: Du verwaltest und optimierst die Leistung von Marketingkampagnen über verschiedene Kanäle, einschließlich Sozialer Medien, E-Mail, SEO und bezahlter Werbung. Außerdem optimierst du Budgets und Ressourcen, um einen maximalen Return on Investment (ROI) zu gewährleisten.

Passion: Du analysiert und erstellst Reportings über die Effektivität von Marketingkampagnen und triffst datengestützte Entscheidungen zur Verbesserung der Ergebnisse.

Team: Du arbeitest zusammen mit passionierten funktionsübergreifenden Teams, einschließlich Design-, Content- und Produktteams, um sicherzustellen, dass die Marketingmaßnahmen integriert und auf die allgemeinen Geschäftsziele abgestimmt sind.

Qualifikation

Wie du uns begeisterst

  • Du hast mindestens 2 Jahre Berufserfahrung in einem Agenturumfeld oder einer Online-Marketing-Firma sammeln können.
  • Du unterstützt unser Paid Advertising Team von der Konzeptionierung, über die Umsetzung bis hin zur Optimierung und Skalierung von Kampagnen mit 6-stelligen monatlichen Werbebudgets.
  • Du übernimmst Verantwortung für mehrere Facebook Werbekonten.
  • Du konzeptionierst und entwickelst Marketing-Strategien für große und bekannte Brands.
  • Du besitzt ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten und Problemlösungskompetenz.
  • Du hast ausgezeichnete Kommunikations- und Kooperationsfähigkeiten.
  • Du hast ein sehr gutes Verständnis für Marketing-Automatisierungs- und Analysetools und fühlst dich im Umgang mit Daten wohl, um fundierte Entscheidungen zu treffen.
  • Du bleibst stets auf dem Laufenden in Bezug auf Branchentrends und bewährte Praktiken im Online-Marketing und suchst kontinuierlich nach neuen Möglichkeiten, um Wachstum und Engagement zu fördern.

Benefits

Wie wir dich begeistern:

Die Basis

BVG Ticket, Urban Sports, Teamevents, 30 Tage Urlaub und das IT-Equipment deiner Wahl.

Vertrauen, Transparenz und Feedback

“Die beste Idee gewinnt” ist eines der Prinzipien, die wir tagtäglich leben. Neben 1:1-Meetings, treffen wir uns für All-Hands-Meeting, um die aktuelle Strategie zu besprechen und Ziele zu reflektieren.

Flexibilität

Wir sind der Meinung, dass das persönliche Zusammenarbeiten ein wesentlicher Bestandteil unserer Unternehmenskultur ist, bieten aber auch die Flexibilität des Remote-Arbeitens. Das bedeutet für uns, das Team jeden Montag im Büro zusammenzubringen, den Rest der Woche kannst du dir flexible gestalten.

Persönliche Entwicklung

Wir sind ein kompaktes und dynamisches Team, das sich ergänzt. Jeder kann in seinen Stärken agieren und sich so persönlich weiterentwickeln. Such dir selbst die Kurse, Coaches oder Weiterbildungen aus, die dich weiterbringen.

Wir stellen Menschen ein und keine Profile. Solltest du dich von der Beschreibung angesprochen fühlen, aber hast nicht alle Qualifikation, freuen wir uns trotzdem auf deine Bewerbung.

title: Web Strategy Specialist
jobDescription:
Levitate’s employees share a very important mission and goal: helping small businesses grow and thrive. We all contribute to this goal in unique ways, and that’s why we prioritize helping our staff identify their strengths and find genuine fulfillment in their roles.

​

Across every team and department at Levitate, you’ll find friendship, enthusiasm, intelligence, and drive. In our pursuit to make the world a more creative and entrepreneurial place, we keep our company’s five core values at the center of everything we do:

  • Creating magic
  • Showing customer empathy
  • Making data-driven decisions
  • Focusing on solutions, not problems
  • Making small improvements every day

​

We’re looking for a Web Strategy Specialist to join our web team! If you’re a highly organized, client-facing professional with a knack for understanding web architecture, a strategic approach to SEO, and a great eye for design, we’d love to hear from you. While no design work is required, this role involves managing the entire lifecycle of web projects—from meeting with clients to gathering requirements, pitching ideas, and ensuring project milestones are met. You’ll also leverage AI tools to craft content and collaborate closely with designers to deliver exceptional websites.

​

Responsibilities:Client Interaction: Meet with clients to gather web requirements, understand their goals, and pitch design ideas effectively. Serve as the primary point of contact for clients throughout the project lifecycle.

​

Web Architecture: Ensure websites are planned with a clear understanding of best practices in navigation, structure, and user experience.

​

Content Strategy: Use AI tools to draft compelling, accurate website content tailored to each client’s needs. Coordinate and implement a basic SEO strategy to improve site visibility and performance.

​

Project Management: Act as the liaison between clients and the design team to ensure project progress aligns with expectations and deadlines. Manage timelines, feedback loops, and final deliverables.

​

Quality Assurance: Ensure that the end product aligns with the client’s vision and maintains high standards of functionality and aesthetics.

​

Qualifications:Experience in client-facing roles, preferably in web or digital projects.

Strong understanding of web architecture and best practices.

Basic knowledge of SEO principles and tools.

Excellent communication and presentation skills.

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.

A keen eye for design and an appreciation for high-quality visuals (though no design work is required).

Familiarity with content creation tools, particularly AI-driven platforms, is a plus.

Experience in project management or coordination is highly preferred.

​

What We Offer:

Collaborative work environment with opportunities for growth.

Hands-on experience working with a diverse range of clients and industries.

​

  • Our commitment to our staff is showcased not only through our strong company culture, but also through our employee-centric benefits and programs including:Daily catered lunches from locally-owned restaurants and diverse snack offerings
  • Employee-led groups (run club, disc golf club, and book club, just to name a few) that bring employees with similar hobbies and interests together to inspire and build relationships
  • Plentiful opportunities to volunteer with and contribute to local organizations that align with the passions of our staff
  • Flexible PTO to facilitate strong work-life balance
  • Paid parental leave that provides employees with support and flexibility as they grow their families
  • Extensive benefit options including healthy lifestyle reimbursement, 401(k) matching, HSA/FSA, dental, vision, and mental health coverage, and much more
  • Culture Crew and Emerging Leader programs to foster employee leadership development, inclusivity, and connection through year-round trainings and events

​

title: Webflow & Graphic Designer
jobDescription:
Company Overview

MetaGravity is a deep-tech startup dedicated to revolutionizing online experiences by building the next-generation web. The company seeks a talented Web Designer & Developer who excels at blending design expertise with technical skill to craft a seamless and engaging digital presence. This role is integral to communicating MetaGravity’s technological innovations and gaming solutions to a global audience.

Key Responsibilities

  • Web Development and Maintenance:
    • Build, manage, and update the MetaGravity and Edge of Chaos websites using Webflow.
    • Optimize the performance of websites for speed, responsiveness, and SEO best practices.
    • Collaborate across teams to create and maintain landing pages, campaign assets, and other marketing materials.
  • UI/UX Design:
    • Craft user-friendly, responsive web designs and prototypes in Figma.
    • Ensure intuitive, visually appealing interfaces that convey complex technical concepts clearly.
  • Content Creation:
    • Design digital assets, including infographics, social media graphics, banners, and promotional materials.
    • Create email templates, brochures, and other digital marketing collateral to enhance engagement.
  • Brand Consistency:
    • Ensure all design work aligns with MetaGravity’s brand guidelines across multiple touchpoints.
  • Optimization and Analytics:
    • Collaborate with the marketing team to analyze website traffic and user behavior, using insights to improve conversion rates and user experiences.
    • Optimize images, graphics, and other web content for enhanced performance.
  • Innovation and Trends:
    • Stay up-to-date with the latest design and web technologies, exploring tools to elevate MetaGravity’s digital presence.

Requirements

  • Experience and Expertise:
    • Minimum 3 years of experience in graphic and web design.
    • Proficiency in Webflow and Figma is mandatory.
    • A strong portfolio showcasing web design and graphic design projects.
  • Design and Development Skills:
    • Strong understanding of UX/UI principles and responsive design.
    • Basic knowledge of HTML/CSS is a plus but not required.
    • Proficiency in low-fi wireframes and high-quality mockups.
  • Communication and Collaboration:
    • Excellent communication skills and a collaborative mindset.
    • Ability to work effectively in a team environment.
  • Optimization Focus:
    • Knowledge of SEO best practices and website performance optimization.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Familiarity with social media design and creating assets for platforms like Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.
  • Experience as an independent designer or front-end developer.
  • Ability to integrate websites with backend systems and third-party services.
  • Passion for the video game industry and its future potential.
  • Knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) is a bonus.

Approach

  1. Purposeful Design:
    • Create intuitive and visually appealing UIs and UXs that simplify complex concepts.
  2. Beautiful Visuals:
    • Design a wide range of marketing assets, including brand templates, infographics, and brochures.
  3. Website Excellence:
    • Use modern web development tools like Webflow to build a high-performing and dynamic website.
  4. Data-Driven Decisions:
    • Leverage user data to refine designs and improve conversion rates.
  5. Stay Ahead:
    • Continuously explore the latest trends in web design and implement cutting-edge technologies.

MetaGravity offers the opportunity to work at the forefront of web innovation, combining creativity and technology to craft extraordinary online experiences. If you’re passionate about design, development, and gaming, this role is your chance to shine. Apply now!

title: Webflow Designer
jobDescription:
Whizz, we're dedicated to revolutionizing transportation for delivery drivers, ensuring that everyone has access to reliable mobility solutions, irrespective of financial barriers. Our mission is to democratize access to vehicle ownership and financing, empowering drivers to achieve success in their delivery careers. We're committed to making transportation seamless and hassle-free, allowing drivers to focus on delivering top-quality service to their customers. As we continue to grow, we are seeking a talented graphic designer to join our team.

About the Role:

We are looking for a Webflow designer to develop engaging and on-brand websites. The ideal candidate will have a strong portfolio demonstrating their creativity and ability to translate ideas into visually appealing designs. This is an excellent opportunity to gain experience in a fast-paced environment while contributing to exciting projects.​

Requirements:

  • 1+ year of experience in Webflow
  • Previous experience in design agencies, marketing-led businesses, or B2C products
  • Deep understanding of UX/UI design principles
  • Proficiency in HTML and CSS
  • Ability to create custom modals and simple scripts (e.g., dynamic headline replacement on the page)
  • Experience setting up basic webhooks to send data to the backend (with IT team support)
  • Experience with graphic editors (Figma, Photoshop)
  • Experience using analytical tools (Google Analytics, Meta CAPI)
  • Skills in working with content management systems (CMS)
  • Experience integrating with various services through APIs
  • Ability to work under deadlines and familiarity with the HADI cycles framework

Nice to have skills:

  • Experience / oversight on the US and Canadian markets
  • Set up integrations with third-party services together with the development department 

Benefits

  • Competitive salary with performance bonuses
  • Friendly and supportive team
  • Opportunity to work and grow professionally at an international level​

Ready to drive change and revolutionize transportation? Apply now and be part of our journey to transform the industry together!

title: Webflow Developer
jobDescription:
Healthcare providers go into medicine to care for people, but end up losing valuable time each day to admin work and other workplace challenges. Time that could otherwise be spent helping patients. And patients end up suffering as a result. At Commure, we build solutions that simplify providers' lives and keep them connected to their patients so they can focus on doing what matters most: providing care.

Our innovative suite of software and hardware – augmented by advanced LLM AI, RTLS, and healthcare workflow automations – boosts efficiency across every domain of healthcare, freeing up healthcare providers to spend more of their time caring for patients. Our growing suite of technologies include staff duress alerting, asset tracking, patient elopement, revenue cycle management, clinical documentation and intake, provider copilots, patient engagement and communication, home health, remote patient monitoring, and more.

Today, we support over 250,000 clinicians across hundreds of care sites around the country. And we’re only just getting started: Healthcare’s watershed moment for AI-powered transformation is here – so join us in creating the technology to power healthcare!

About The Role

​Commure + Athelas is seeking a Webflow/Frontend Developer to develop and optimize our website and web applications. This role will work closely with our engineering and design teams to build efficient, maintainable, and scalable frontend solutions that align with our technical and business goals. Your expertise in Webflow, web design principles, and front-end development will help us create an engaging and seamless online presence that aligns with our brand and business objectives.

What You'll Do

  • Develop, maintain, and enhance Commure’s website and landing pages using Webflow, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frontend frameworks
  • Work closely with designers to translate Figma designs into responsive, high-quality Webflow and landing pages
  • Maintain and extend design system consistency cross-browser and mobile compatibility
  • Implement animations, interactions, and other advanced Webflow features to improve user experience
  • Ensure high performance, accessibility, and SEO best practices across all web assets
  • Maintain a scalable and well-structured Webflow CMS
  • Implement frontend logic, reusable components, and integrate APIs to enhance functionality
  • Troubleshoot and resolve website and web application performance or technical issues
  • Stay up to date with the latest trends in frontend development, Webflow capabilities, and best coding practices

What You Have

  • 3+ years of experience in frontend development with a strong portfolio of responsive and interactive web applications
  • Proficiency in Webflow, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frontend frameworks like React or Vue
  • Experience with web performance optimization, accessibility, and best coding practices
  • Familiarity with analytics tools and debugging techniques
  • Experience integrating APIs and third-party services
  • Strong understanding of version control (Git) and CI/CD workflows
  • Ability to work independently, manage multiple projects, and collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams

Why you’ll love working at Commure + Athelas:

  • Highly Driven Team: We work hard and fast for exceptional results, knowing we’re doing mission-driven work to transform the country’s largest sector.
  • Strong Backing: We are backed by top investors including General Catalyst, Sequoia, Y Combinator, Lux, Human Capital, 8VC, Greenoaks Capital and Elad Gil.
  • Incredible Growth: Prior to our merger, Commure and Athelas had independently grown more than 500% YoY for three consecutive years. We’ve achieved Series D funding, have an industry-leading runway, and continue to scale rapidly.
  • Competitive Benefits: Flexible PTO (pending specific geographical locations) , medical, dental, vision, maternity and paternity leave. Note that benefits are subject to change and may vary based on jurisdiction.

Commure + Athelas is committed to creating and fostering a diverse team. We are open to all backgrounds and levels of experience, and believe that great people can always find a place. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to all applicants throughout the application process.

Please be aware that all official communication from us will come exclusively from email addresses ending in @getathelas.com or @commure.com. Any emails from other domains are not affiliated with our organization.

Employees will act in accordance with the organization’s information security policies, to include but not limited to protecting assets from unauthorized access, disclosure, modification, destruction or interference nor execute particular security processes or activities. Employees will report to the information security office any confirmed or potential events or other risks to the organization. Employees will be required to attest to these requirements upon hire and on an annual basis.

Compensation Range: $140K - $190K

title: Webflow Developer
jobDescription:
At HackerRank, we are on a mission to change the world to value skills over pedigree. We are a high-performing, mission-driven team that truly, madly, deeply cares about what we do. We don’t see velocity and quality as tradeoffs; both matter. If you take pride in high-impact work and thrive in a driven team, HackerRank is where you belong.

About the team:

The brand and corporate communications team’s role is to amplify HackerRank’s vision to the world. We are the ones who bring clarity and constant communication to our community of talent and technical professionals. We hold a very high bar for excellence, as we take the responsibility of being entrusted with the company’s story seriously. As part of this, we own one of the most valued touchpoints with our customers - HackerRank.com

About the role:

We are seeking a skilled Webflow Developer with a strong understanding of marketing principles to join our team. This role requires a blend of technical expertise and creative marketing strategies to build and optimize our website, landing pages, and digital assets. The ideal candidate will have experience in Webflow development, UI/UX best practices, SEO optimization, and conversion rate optimization (CRO).

What you’ll do:

Bullet pointed list of the job main responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and maintain responsive and visually engaging websites using Webflow.
  • Optimize website performance, SEO, and user experience to drive traffic and conversions.
  • Integrate third-party tools such as CRM systems, email marketing platforms, analytics tools, and automation workflows.
  • Troubleshoot website issues, implement A/B testing, and refine designs based on data-driven insights.
  • Maintain consistency in branding, style guides, and design aesthetics across digital platforms.

You will thrive in this role if:

  • You excel at quickly making pixel perfect webpages.
  • You are passionate about every aspect of the customer experience.
  • You have a track record of being scrappy.
  • You bring deep care to the table.

What you bring:

Requirements:

  • 5+ years working in Webflow
  • Proven experience as a Webflow Developer, with a strong portfolio showcasing responsive, high-performing websites.
  • Must have experience implementing advanced transitions and animations using native webflow interactions or custom javascript. Experience with GSAP and HTML Canvas/WebGL is a plus.
  • Understanding of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Webflow’s CMS structure.
  • Experience working with marketing teams and understanding digital marketing concepts such as lead generation, SEO, PPC, and conversion rate optimization.
  • Experience with embedding forms, videos, and third-party scripts.
  • Strong UX/UI design skills and knowledge of design principles.
  • Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and other analytics tools.
  • Experience integrating APIs, forms, and automation tools like Zapier.
  • Ability to effectively QA site changes.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines effectively.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience being the sole owner of a marketing website
  • Experience with Animation tools (Rive, Jitter, or Lottie), or similar design tools.
  • Experience building in HubSpot
  • Previous experience in a marketing or growth-focused role.

Current base salary range: $120,000 - $150,000. The exact salary may vary based on skills, experience, location, market ranges, and other compensation offered. The salary range does not include other compensation components, commissions (for sales-related roles), bonuses, or benefits for which you may be eligible. Salary may be adjusted based on business needs.

HackerRank is a proud equal employment opportunity and affirmative action employer. We provide equal opportunity to everyone for employment based on individual performance and qualification. title: Website & Graphic Designer
jobDescription:
Full job description

This position can be located in our Terre Haute OR Indianapolis office.

​

Job Summary

RJL Solutions is looking for a Website & Graphic Designer to join our growing company. If you have at least 5 years of experience and are ready to bring your creativity and expertise to a high-performing, innovative marketing team, we want to hear from you.

​

As a Website & Graphic Designer, you’ll play a key role in shaping digital experiences and brand identities. The ideal candidate is a creative thinker with strong web design and graphic design skills, supporting branding, marketing, and digital initiatives. This role requires:

​

✅ Expertise in UX/UI design

✅ Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite

✅ The ability to take projects from concept to completion

​

At RJL Solutions, we thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, fostering an outstanding culture of teamwork and innovation. If you're passionate about design and ready to make an impact, apply now to be considered for this exciting opportunity!

​

Responsibilities

​

Work directly with clients and manage projects from concept to completion.

Design and develop stunning, user-friendly websites with performance and functionality in mind.

Create cohesive branding and messaging by collaborating with the marketing team.

Translate concepts into wireframes, user flows, and prototypes.

Optimize websites for performance, responsiveness, and cross-browser compatibility.

Ensure brand consistency across all digital and print materials.

Apply UX/UI best practices to create engaging and intuitive user experiences.

Design graphics for marketing materials, social media, email campaigns, and print collateral.

Stay ahead of industry trends to keep designs fresh, innovative, and competitive.

Manage multiple projects and meet tight deadlines.

Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, InDesign).

Experience with WordPress, Webflow, or other CMS platforms.

Strong understanding of HTML, CSS, and basic web development principles.

Familiarity with SEO best practices and digital marketing strategies.

Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects simultaneously.

Degree in Graphic Design, Web Design, or a related field preferred.

To apply, Please submit your resume with professional references, cover letter, and up to three examples of your work to Kelly Walker, Senior Director of Marketing, at kwalker@rjlsolutions.com.

title: Content Producer
aboutCompany: Victory World Church, Inc. is dedicated to building a vibrant online community and promoting our mission through innovative content creation. We value creativity, collaboration, and a strong commitment to our core values.
jobDescription:
Join our dynamic team as a Content Producer and play a pivotal role in enhancing our online presence. This remote creative position focuses on producing engaging content that builds community and drives brand growth through innovative video and social media strategies. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to craft content that resonates with our audience across various platforms, including Webflow.

​

Key Responsibilities:

  • Develop, produce, and publish compelling content for social media channels such as Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube, and more.
  • Collaborate with the Social Coordinator to effectively plan, schedule, and coordinate marketing campaigns and evergreen content.
  • Work closely with designers, video producers, and copywriters to create captivating visuals and multimedia assets.
  • Manage the entire content production process from ideation to delivery of polished outputs.
  • Analyze performance metrics (engagement, reach, conversions) and optimize strategies based on insights.
  • Stay updated with the latest trends in social media and web publishing to innovate content strategies.
  • Ensure all produced content aligns with our brand guidelines, tone of voice, and accessibility standards.

​

Qualifications:

  • Proven experience as a Content Producer, Social Media Manager, or a related role within the no-code or creative industries.
  • Strong portfolio showcasing successful work across multiple platforms.
