title: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Lead
jobDescription:
Questrade Financial Group (QFG), through its companies - Questrade, Inc., Questrade Wealth Management Inc., Community Trust Company, ThinkInsure, Zolo, and Flexiti, provides securities and foreign currency investment, professionally managed investment portfolios, mortgages, insurance, real estate services, financial services and more. Questrade uses cutting-edge technologies to develop innovative products that give customers better, more affordable ways to take control of their money.

​

We are everything a traditional financial institution is not. At QFG, you will be constantly moving forward, bringing the future of fintech into existence. You will be a part of a collaborative team that cares deeply about our mission and each other. Your team members will help you conquer challenges, push boundaries and discover what you are truly capable of.

​

This is a place where you can explore, discover and learn with continuous growth. As a diverse and inclusive place to work, with a hybrid working environment you can unleash your creativity and curiosity with no limits. If you share the same sense of infinite possibility, come shape your future at QFG.

​

What’s in it for you as an employee of QFG?

​

  • Health & wellbeing resources and programs 
  • Paid vacation, personal, and sick days for work-life balance
  • Competitive compensation and benefits packages
  • Work-life balance in a hybrid environment with at least 3 days in office
  • Career growth and development opportunities
  • Opportunities to contribute to community causes
  • Work with diverse team members in an inclusive and collaborative environment

We’re looking for our next Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Lead. Could It Be You?

​

The purpose of this role is to lead the development and prioritization of the experimentation strategy and roadmap to enhance the performance, usability and conversion rates on Questrade.com.

​

Working closely with the marketing, design, product and development teams, this role will be responsible for the implementation of testing strategies that drive business growth and improve user experience.

​

As the CRO Lead, you will support in establishing the experimentation framework, processes and operations & governance model to ensure continuous growth and maturity of the CRO practice, to build a best-in-class center of excellence for experimentation and optimization in the organization.

​

You will lead in defining the strategy, roadmap, prioritization and implementation of the experimentation strategies to continuously optimize performance and conversion rates on Questrade.com, and collaborate with cross-functional teams on the execution of the tests.

​

You will have a strong understanding of A/B testing on websites, content optimization and data & performance analysis to identify testing strategies, define measurement methodologies and prioritize ongoing experimentation opportunities.

​

Need more details? Keep reading…

​

In this role, responsibilities include but are not limited to: 

​

  • Lead in establishing the CRO function, strategy and roadmap 
  • Ensure continuous growth & maturity of the CRO practice to build a best-in-class center of excellence for experimentation and optimization 
  • Establish and ensure governance & adoption of federated experimentation framework, operations model and processes 
  • Drive web performance for conversion, acquisition and improved customer experience through continuous experimentation across Journeys 
  • Drive adoption of experimentation framework that scores, prioritizes and recommends opportunities to gain alignment from key stakeholders on experiments to achieve Journey and Mission objectives and key results 
  • Plan and design prioritized testing strategies including:
    • stating hypothesis, 
    • identifying experiment goals/KPIs, 
    • identifying data requirements, 
    • defining segmentation and targeting criteria,
    • defining test type, scope and complexity,
    • confirming measurement methodology/plan
  • Responsible for leading the end-to-end test implementation, reviews, approvals and execution, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver on their respective areas for testing 
  • Validation of test implementation, including audience validation, test configuration, tracking and measurement for successful launch 
  • Share results, insights and learnings to inform business decisions 
  • Build a repository of learnings as the center of excellence to share across the organization 
  • Champion an experimentation culture across the organization to embrace continuous optimization to drive acquisition and business outcomes 
  • Identify resource/skills requirements, team capacity and risks to deliver on implementation strategies and scope 
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to intake, identify and prioritize testing opportunities to improve conversion performance 
  • Effectively manage relationships across internal and external teams/partners and vendors 

So are YOU our next Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Lead? You are if you…

​

  • Have 5+ years of experience in digital and performance marketing 
  • Have proven experience in developing strategy, recommendations and driving outcomes to improve conversion performance, increase engagement and enhance user experience on websites 
  • Have proven experience establishing processes and scaling operations for website experimentation 
  • Have demonstrable success in launching various types of tests (A/B, multivariate, etc.) and personalized journeys with ability to get alignment and support across senior leaders, cross-functional teams and stakeholders 
  • Have strong analytical capability to interpret data and turn them into actionable recommendations
  • Have the ability to organize, frame and articulate experimentation results and recommendations in a simple and effective manner to senior leaders and stakeholders 
  • Have an understanding of conversion and optimization tools (Adobe Target, etc.) 
  • Are extremely organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage scope and priorities across multiple teams and project streams 
  • Have strong interpersonal, problem solving, and decision making skills 
  • Have an understanding of agile methodologies and experience working in an agile environment 

Additional Kudos If You…

​

  • Have previous experience in financial services industry
  • Have experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, etc.), web analytics tools (Google Analytics, etc.), and CMS/DAM systems
  • Have working knowledge of front-end code to fluidly converse with developers and UX designers

Sounds like you? Click below to apply!

​

At Questrade Financial Group of Companies, with multiple office locations around the world, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive and accessible work environment. This is an environment where individuals are treated with dignity and respect. Here, the unique skills and experience you bring will be valued. You will be supported and motivated, so that you can harness your unlimited potential. Our team reflects the diversity of the communities we serve and operate in. Having a collaborative and diverse team helps us push boundaries to bring the future of fintech into existence—not only for the benefit of our customers, but for those who build their career with us.

​

Questrade Financial Group of companies Applicant Tracking System utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) for application screening. The AI system operates on predetermined criteria, with final decisions subject to human review.

​

Candidates selected for an interview will be contacted directly. If you require accommodation during the recruitment/selection process, please let us know and we will work with you to meet your needs.

​

Our mission is to make our customers wealthy.

We're building the wealth super app of the future. An app to build your long-term wealth across savings, investments and pensions.

We use technology to break down barriers so users can invest like the ultra-wealthy, giving them one simple place to manage, grow and protect their wealth.

The Sunday Times listed Chip as the 6th fastest growing tech company in Britain… and we're not slowing down. Chip serves over 300,000 active customers and looks after over £5billion in assets. These customers trust us to build the most amazing product we can, so working at Chip comes with real purpose.

Chip is being built by a fast-growing team of designers, developers, customer service professionals, marketers, banking experts, and entrepreneurs. Our funding story though is a little different. Chip is one of the most crowd-funded businesses in Europe, having raised over £50m from 29,000 investors, over 9 years. Crowdfunding is in our DNA and only Brewdog has more investors than Chip.

Our vision

We know planning for your future can be a tedious, daunting task often avoided, so we want to change that.

We're building the wealth app for our community, giving them one place for saving and investing.

We're giving customers control and guidance to effortlessly build their long-term wealth using award-winning tech, while celebrating their achievements along the way.

In practical terms this means adding more savings accounts and investment opportunities for Chip members to passively grow their wealth, combined with intelligent tools and intuitive features to make it easier for them to actively build up their wealth.

We’re all huge believers in making managing wealth more effortless, and as automated as possible. So everyone can feel empowered to focus on achieving the things that really matter to them.

Savings

Chip is a trading name of Chip Financial Ltd and is authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority under the Payment Services Regulation 2017 for the provision of payment services. Firm Reference Number 911255.

Only eligible deposits held in the Chip Savings Accounts (powered by ClearBank) are covered by the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (“FSCS”) subject to eligibility. To find out more and to check your eligibility please visit : fscs.org.uk / about-us / . ClearBank is responsible for the provision of the Chip Instant Access Account, the Chip Prize Savings Account & the Chip Cash ISA. This means deposits held across these accounts would be eligible for a total of £85,000 of FSCS protection ONLY.

There are certain situations where your deposits are not covered by FSCS, but are protected through the FCA’s safeguarding rules. For more information, please visit : https : / / getchip.uk / how-we-protect-your-money .

Prize Savings Account (“PSA”)

T&Cs, eligibility criteria and minimum average balance of £100 applies. FSCS limits of £85,000 apply to eligible deposits. Prizes are not cash and are applied to your PSA as a bonus. Prizes become cash once you withdraw your entire PSA balance into your linked bank account. Prizes are not eligible for FSCS protection. This account does not offer interest. For current prize values, entry and eligibility criteria and how to opt-out see : getchip.uk / legal / prize-savings-account-terms .

You can opt out of any or all prize draws at any time by contacting our Customer Success team via our in-app chat, or emailing support on hello@getchip.uk . If you have opted out, you can opt back in at any time via the same channels. You acknowledge that if you opt out, you will no longer be eligible for entry into prize draws.The PSA and prize draws are offered and managed by Chip. ClearBank is responsible for only the provision of the account and holding your funds which are FSCS protected (subject to eligibility). ClearBank is also responsible for the provision of the Chip Instant Access Account. This means deposits held across both accounts would be eligible for a total of £85,000 of FSCS protection ONLY.‍

Investments

Chip Financial (Investments) Ltd is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority, under firm reference number 1005114. When investing your capital is at risk, and the value of your investments can go up as well as down and you may receive less than your original investment. Past performance is not a reliable indicator of future performance. Chip does not provide investment advice, and you as an individual investor should make your own decisions or seek professional independent advice.Your money may be protected up to £85,000 by the Financial Services Compensation Scheme (“FSCS”) under their Investment Scheme. This means that in the event Chip Financial (Investments) Ltd is declared to be in default and cannot meet their obligations, you may be able to claim compensation. It’s important to understand that the FSCS doesn’t cover you in the event that your investments go down and you get back less than what you put in. Further information is available from the FSCS website ( fscs.org.uk ).

Chip Cash ISA

Your Chip Cash ISA is a cash ISA provided by ClearBank Limited, authorised by the Prudential Regulation Authority and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority and Prudential Regulation Authority under registration number 754568. ClearBank Limited is approved by His Majesty’s Revenue and Customers (“HMRC”) for the purposes of the Individual Savings Accounts Regulations 1998 as an ISA manager. ClearBank Limited is registered in England and Wales under company number 09736376 with registered office : ClearBank, Borough Yards, 13 Dirty Lane, London, SE1 9PA. Your deposit is eligible for protection under the Financial Services Compensation Scheme ("FSCS"). Your eligible deposits with Clearbank Limited are protected up to a total of £85,000.

Chip Financial Ltd (“Chip”) is registered in England and Wales, registration number : #10113174

Our registered office is : Chip Financial Ltd, 7 Bell Yard, London, WC2A 2JRNote that Chip is not a bank, meaning that we do not have physical branches, issue debit bank cards nor are you able to access your Chip money via ATMs. Chip does not provide financial advice and our services are only available via the Chip app.

NB : Please include a link to your portfolio when applying.

We need a junior web designer to join our fast growing web team.

We want someone who’ll bring creative flair tempered with web design best practice, and technical skills to build the designs they sketch out.

You’ll be a key part of a tightknit team tasked with building and scaling Chip’s website.

This job is perfect if you love tinkering with websites and new tech, and enjoy playing with a website to build, grow and improve it with new functionality. So we’d hope you're technically minded and confident with a range of tech and software that goes into building a website.

We use a CMS called Webflow, which is designed to empower designers to develop websites, so bonus points if you’ve used it before (or something like Webflow, i.e. another similar no-code website builder).

But above all, this is a design job, so we’d expect you to bring some serious creative ambition and eye for design to the job, the bolder the better.

This is a junior role, so we don’t expect you to bring years of experience, but we do want to see a portfolio of work, an aptitude for design (with professional skills and training), and some experience of working with a team in a professional environment would be useful.

Ultimately this will be a very rewarding role for someone with drive and who wants to design and build an amazing website. There’s space if you like to work autonomously and take initiative, and lots of room to grow. But you won’t be alone, as you’ll be part the wider design and Marketing teams, with experienced colleagues on hand to help you

What you can expect to be doing :

  • Working within our web team to build and maintain a beautiful high performance website
  • Designing web pages and customer journey flows
  • Playing an integral part of the design team to embed our brand design system in the website
  • Collaborating with content marketers to create compelling narratives to sell our products and make finance simple
  • Working closely with performance marketers to improve web click through rates and SEO performance

What we’re looking for :

Evidence of design ability, specifically web design (a portfolio of work)

Experience with designing with Webflow (or similar web design CMS), and developing and maintaining the built-in Webflow CMS

Experienced with Figma (or similar design platform)

Basic working knowledge of HTML and CSS

Confident using third party tools to extend functionality of Webflow (such as : LottieFiles, Zapier, Make)

Understanding of plug and play API tools (Zapier or similar)

Confidence to tinker with tech to learn and master new softwares and functionalities

Switched on to design trends and best practices for web

Impressive attention to detail

Have worked in collaborative environment

Nice to haves

Basic Javascript knowledge

Experience with other creative tools (photography, filming etc.)

Experience working and evolving an existing brand

Interest in finance, and ability to create clear designs which help our audience navigate and understand financial products in a smart and straightforward way

Experienced with Adobe CC including After Effects, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, InDesign and Illustrator

What we’re really looking for : ✍️

Someone with a genuine interest in Chip and is excited about being part of a fast-growing company and our mission to build the investment super app of the future.

Although we’re in the financial space, and under the scrutiny that comes with it, the current marketing team works well together, and even sometimes with a smile. We’re sure you’ve got the technical skills, otherwise, you would have stopped reading by now, so let us be clear on what will make us want to work with you.

We want a real person, with interests outside of work, to join our team. You could be a dancer, a gamer, a musician, a parent, a hockey fan, or even that one person that still writes Twilight fan-fiction. Doesn’t matter to us.

At the interview stages, we will be looking for empathy, eq, fun stories, and the ability to smile even when things are tough.

Working Hours ⏰

Monday to Thursday : 9 : 00 AM – 6 : 00 PM

Friday : 8 : 00 AM – 4 : 00 PM (Start your weekend early!)

Enjoy a structured yet balanced workweek, with an early Friday finish to kickstart your weekend!

PERKS 🎁

31,500 per annum

Discretionary Performance-Related Bi-Annual Bonus of up to 10% (Cash) and 5% (Shares) based on your gross annual salary.

Workplace pension scheme - We invest in your future with a workplace pension scheme , contributing 5% on earnings up to £50,000 . Plan ahead with confidence while you grow your career! 🚀

Private medical insurance (medical history disregarded)

Employee Assistance Programme

Cycle to work scheme

Season ticket loan

Free ChipX subscription for UK-based employees

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity

Flexible working arrangements

28 days holiday plus bank holidays, plus the days between Christmas and New Year ✈️

Annual training budget for courses, workshops, or conferences to help you advance your career.

30 per month Chip Fitness Benefit to suit your Mental / Physical Wellbeing

Company laptop

Opportunity to have a huge impact on our product while fast-tracking your knowledge, responsibility and skills in a high-growth fintech startup 🚀

Our Interview Process : 📖

Video screen with someone from our Design team

Video interview with the hiring manager

Final interview with Head of Brand & VP of Marketing

About Chip

Our mission is to make our customers wealthy.

We're building the wealth super app of the future. An app to build your long-term wealth across savings, investments and pensions.

We use technology to break down barriers so users can invest like the ultra-wealthy, giving them one simple place to manage, grow and protect their wealth.

The Sunday Times listed Chip as the 6th fastest growing tech company in Britain… and we're not slowing down. Chip serves over 300,000 active customers and looks after over £5billion in assets. These customers trust us to build the most amazing product we can, so working at Chip comes with real purpose.

Chip is being built by a fast-growing team of designers, developers, customer service professionals, marketers, banking experts, and entrepreneurs. Our funding story though is a little different. Chip is one of the most crowd-funded businesses in Europe, having raised over £50m from 29,000 investors, over 9 years. Crowdfunding is in our DNA and only Brewdog has more investors than Chip.

Our vision

We know planning for your future can be a tedious, daunting task often avoided, so we want to change that. We're building the wealth app for our community, giving them one place for saving and investing.

We're giving customers control and guidance to effortlessly build their long-term wealth using award-winning tech, while celebrating their achievements along the way.

Who we are

Chip has a creative and diverse team of 180, from all different backgrounds and industries. We’re driven and passionate people, but no one takes themselves too seriously.

Don’t just take our word for it. We have a few awards under our belt, including Best Personal Finance App at the 2022 & 2024 British Bank Awards.

Our Values

Be ACCOUNTABLE

Everything you do matters, Care about the end result, Challenge the norm, Disagree, yet commit to making it happen once a decision has been made, Do the best job possible

Be BOLD

Share our Ambition and do your bit to achieve it, Innovate : challenge the norm, break the mould and make it happen, Set goals that truly align with our mission, Do your best for our customers

Be COLLABORATIVE

Work cross-functionally - we win as a team, Build strong relationships based on trust, Treat others fairly and respectfully, Hold others to account, Be supportive and inclusive, Have fun together

Equal Opportunities

We are passionate and committed to our people and go beyond the rhetoric of diversity and inclusion. You will be working in an inclusive environment and be encouraged to bring your whole self to work. We will do all that we can to help you successfully balance your work and home life. As a growing business we will encourage you to develop your professional and personal aspirations, enjoy new experiences, and learn from the talented people you will be working with. It’s talent that matters to us and we encourage applications from people irrespective of their gender, race, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability status or caring responsibilities.

Note to Agencies

Chip does not accept unsolicited CVs from recruiters or employment agencies in response to any of our live roles on our career page. Chip will not consider or agree to payment of any referral compensation or recruiter fee relating to these unsolicited CVs. Chip explicitly reserves the right to hire those candidate(s) without any financial obligation to the recruiter or agency. Any unsolicited CVs, including those submitted to hiring managers, are deemed to be the property of Chip.

title: Marketing & SEO Expert
jobDescription:
Full job description

Marketing & SEO Expert

​

Location: Davie, FL (On-site/Hybrid)

Company: Sanoma Builders

Job Type: Full-time

​

About Us:Sanoma Builders and Sonoma Kitchen & Bath are premier Design/Build firms specializing in high-end residential and commercial remodeling. With over a decade of experience, we take pride in delivering exceptional craftsmanship, innovative design solutions, and personalized service to our clients. We are seeking a Marketing & SEO Expert to elevate our brand, strengthen our digital presence, and drive business growth through strategic marketing initiatives.

​

Job Responsibilities:

​

Digital Marketing & SEO:

​

✅ Develop and execute SEO strategies to improve organic search rankings and increase website traffic.

✅ Conduct keyword research and implement on-page and off-page SEO best practices.

✅ Optimize website content, meta descriptions, and technical SEO to enhance search visibility.

✅ Monitor website analytics and SEO metrics to refine marketing strategies.

​

Social Media & Paid Advertising:

​

✅ Manage and optimize paid social media campaigns (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, etc.).

✅ Develop engaging content strategies and schedule posts across platforms.

✅ Track, analyze, and report on campaign performance, making data-driven adjustments.

✅ Implement retargeting and lead-generation strategies to drive conversions.

​

Email Marketing & Newsletters:

​

✅ Plan and execute email marketing campaigns, including newsletters and promotional content.

✅ Manage email lists, segmentation, and automation for maximum engagement.

✅ A/B test subject lines, content, and layouts for optimal performance.

​

Website Management & Updates:

​

✅ Oversee website updates, ensuring accurate and engaging content.

✅ Collaborate with developers and designers to enhance user experience (UX/UI).

✅ Implement and monitor website performance improvements.

​

Public Relations & Brand Awareness:

​

✅ Develop and manage PR campaigns to enhance brand reputation.

✅ Coordinate with media outlets, influencers, and industry partners for press coverage.

✅ Write and distribute press releases and articles to relevant publications.

✅ Create and organize company events to boost brand visibility.

✅ Engage with trade professionals, including interior designers and architects, to build relationships.

✅ Attend industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to represent the company and strengthen partnerships.

​

Qualifications & Skills:

​

Proven experience in SEO, digital marketing, and social media campaign management.

Expertise in Google Ads, Facebook Ads Manager, and LinkedIn Ads.

Strong knowledge of SEO tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, etc.).

Experience with email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, Constant Contact, etc.).

Familiarity with WordPress, Shopify, or similar CMS platforms for website updates.

Excellent copywriting and content creation skills.

Strong analytical mindset with a data-driven approach.

PR experience in managing media relationships and brand communication is a plus.

Strong networking and relationship-building skills within the design and construction industry.

​

Why Join Us?

​

✨ Work with a passionate and talented team in a growing Design/Build firm.

✨ Opportunity to lead and shape the company's digital marketing strategy.

✨ Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

✨ A creative, collaborative, and results-driven work environment.

​

How to Apply:

Send your resume, portfolio, and a brief cover letter detailing your experience to gil@sanomakitchens.com

​

Job Type: Full-time

​

Pay: $60,000.00 - $100,000.00 per year

​

Schedule:

​

8 hour shift

Monday to Friday

Ability to Relocate:

​

Davie, FL 33328: Relocate before starting work (Required)

Work Location: In person

title: Part-Time Web Developer (Webflow/Framer) - Freelance | Remote | 3-Month Contract
jobDescription:

title: Senior Test Engineer – Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
jobDescription:
AmeriSave Mortgage is a leading online mortgage lender, dedicated to simplifying the mortgage process and empowering homeowners with fast, transparent, and competitively priced loans. In addition to helping customers achieve the dream of homeownership, we also assist them with refinancing existing mortgages and securing home equity loans. Through our innovative technology and customer-centric focus, we strive to make home financing more accessible and tailored to individual needs.

 

Position Overview

AmeriSave is seeking a Senior Test Engineer to join our high-impact Marketing team, focused on Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO). You’ll lead experimentation efforts using VWO and Google Analytics to design, implement, and analyze A/B and multivariate tests that drive measurable improvements in user experience and conversion performance.

 

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the design and execution of A/B and multivariate tests using VWO.
  • Collaborate with marketing, product, design, and engineering teams to define test hypotheses and KPIs.
  • Ensure test accuracy through rigorous QA and validation processes.
  • Analyze test results using Google Analytics and other tools to extract actionable insights.
  • Maintain and prioritize a robust backlog of test ideas aligned with business goals.
  • Mentor junior team members and help establish best practices for experimentation.
  • Monitor user behavior and site performance to identify optimization opportunities.

 

Qualifications

  • 4+ years of experience in CRO, QA, or front-end engineering roles.
  • Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and browser debugging tools.
  • Hands-on experience with VWO and Google Analytics is required.
  • Strong understanding of statistical significance, test design, and experimentation frameworks.
  • Excellent communication and documentation skills.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in mortgage, fintech, or lead generation environments.
  • Familiarity with tag management systems like Google Tag Manager.
  • Awareness of accessibility and performance optimization best practices.

What We Offer

  • Competitive Compensation: Base salary plus performance-based incentives.
  • Comprehensive Benefits: Medical, dental, vision, 401(k) with company match, generous PTO, and more.
  • Growth Potential: Join a dynamic, fast-paced organization where your contributions directly impact our growth trajectory—across home purchase, refinance, and home equity loan products.
  • Collaborative Culture: Work with a driven and talented team that values innovation, data, and continuous improvement.

 

An opportunity to influence the strategic direction of a dynamic, rapidly growing organization.

**Please note that the compensation information that follows is a good faith estimate for this position only and is provided pursuant to the Colorado Equal Pay for Equal Work Act and Equal Pay Transparency Rules. It is estimated based on what a successful Colorado applicant might be paid. It assumes that the successful candidate will be in Colorado or perform the position from Colorado. Similar positions located outside of Colorado will not necessarily receive the same compensation. ** 

  

Compensation: 

Annual compensation range for this position is $100,000 - $170,000. Compensation commensurate with experience. 

 

Benefits: 

  • 401(k) 
  • Dental insurance 
  • Disability insurance 
  • Employee discounts 
  • Health insurance 
  • Life insurance 
  • Paid time off 
  • 12 paid holidays per year 
  • Paid training 
  • Referral program 
  • Vision insurance 

  

AmeriSave is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

title: Senior UI/UX & Web Designer
jobDescription:
As a SeniorUI/UX & Web Designer at Designity, you will craft seamless digital experiences across websites, apps, and interactive platforms. From wireframing to final execution, you'll design intuitive user interfaces and optimize user experiences that blend creativity with functionality. Whether refining an eCommerce platform, structuring a marketing site, or designing a product, you’ll push boundaries while ensuring usability and performance. You will use AI-driven tools to refine layouts, streamline workflows, and enhance usability, while collaborating with top creatives and experienced Creative Directors to transform client visions into high-impact digital solutions.

‍

Designity is a Creative-as-a-Service (CaaS) platform that empowers businesses with a flexible, high-quality, and scalable alternative to traditional agencies and in-house teams.

‍

Our unique model connects marketing and creative leaders with the top 3% of US-based creative and marketing talent, all led by experienced Creative Directors, Project Managers, and Marketing Strategists. Through our collaborative platform, we streamline the creative process, ensuring fast, high-impact execution without the inefficiencies of hiring in-house or the high costs of traditional agencies.

‍

Brands like Calendly, Kung Fu Tea, and Marriott Hotels trust Designity to handle their design and marketing needs—proving that there's a better way to scale creativity. Unlike in-house hiring, which is expensive and skill-limiting, or marketplaces like Upwork and Fiverr, which lack reliability and creative oversight, Designity delivers a seamless, results-driven approach that makes creative collaboration effortless.

‍

PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity designs to design visually compelling, user-friendly websites and apps.
  • Develop responsive, interactive designs that adapt seamlessly across devices.
  • Apply UX research, accessibility standards, and iterative testing to refine usability.
  • Build and customize websites using CMS platforms like WordPress, Webflow, Shopify, and Wix.
  • Work with Creative Directors and designers to strategise, refine, and implement feedback.
  • Leverage AI-powered tools to create innovative, user-first digital experiences and stay ahead of industry trends.

REQUIREMENTS

  • 6+ years of experience in UI/UX and web design, backed by a strong portfolio showcasing website/app designs, wireframes, and interactive experiences.
  • Experience with wireframing, mobile/web UI design, interactive sites, and UX testing.
  • Proficiency in Adobe XD, Adobe Creative Suite, and familiarity with CMS platforms like WordPress and Shopify.
  • Experience using AI-powered tools in your day-to-day work.
  • Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects.
  • Proactive, adaptable, and committed to delivering high-quality work.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

BIG PLUS:

  • Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

BENEFITS:

  • Join a company at the perfect moment! Career making opportunity.
  • Work fully remotely from wherever you are.
  • Unwind during the flexible PTO, and company holidays.
  • Learn and grow with the best by becoming part of our exclusive Design Community.
  • Enjoy dedicated focus times designed to boost your productivity and creativity.

‍

In order to be considered for this position, you need to complete the application process at www.designity.com/careers/senior-ui-ux-web-designer

‍

Please do NOT follow up on your application. We will be in touch within 2-3 weeks if you're qualified.

‍

At Designity, employment decisions are based on business needs, qualifications, and merit. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer, valuing diversity in culture, perspectives, skills, and experiences, which strengthens our team, clients, and products.

title: Senior Webflow Developer
jobDescription:
The Senior Webflow Developer will contribute to our web development team by creating high-performance client marketing websites that drive leads and convert prospects to customers. This senior role requires advanced expertise in CSS, HTML, and JavaScript, along with a proven track record of implementing complex Webflow solutions.

Essential Functions:

  • Strategic Web Development Advancement: Beyond just building websites, you'll establish and implement development standards, architectural patterns, and technical strategies to enhance our Webflow capabilities. You'll evaluate new frameworks, tools, and techniques to continually improve our development processes.
  • Advanced Website Design & Development: You'll lead the design and development of complex, custom websites, tackling our most challenging projects and overseeing junior developers' work. You'll develop reusable components, establish site architecture, and implement custom code solutions that exceed client expectations.
  • Technical Mentorship & Team Development: You'll mentor junior developers, conduct code reviews, provide technical guidance, and help team members grow their skills. You'll lead by example through your work quality and share your expertise through documentation and training sessions.
  • Webflow Optimization & Advanced Integration: You'll implement advanced Webflow techniques including complex interactions, custom code solutions, and third-party API integrations. You'll optimize sites for performance, SEO, and conversion rate while ensuring cross-browser compatibility and ADA compliance.
  • Client Strategy Consultation: You'll serve as a technical expert in client meetings as needed, communicating complex concepts clearly while providing strategic recommendations on information architecture, user experience, and technical implementation approaches. You'll partner with project managers to ensure client satisfaction.
  • Quality Assurance Leadership: You'll establish and maintain quality standards across our web development team, implementing testing methodologies, defining acceptance criteria, and ensuring consistent code quality. You'll review team deliverables and provide constructive feedback while solving complex technical challenges.
  • Marketing Strategy & Solution Architecture: You'll collaborate with cross-functional teams to architect comprehensive digital solutions that integrate websites with marketing campaigns and conversion strategies. You'll make high-level recommendations on technical approach and implementation that align with client business goals.

What To Expect:

  • Expert Technical Communication: You'll articulate complex technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. You'll document design decisions, development patterns, and technical specifications, while collaborating effectively across departments and directly with clients.
  • Meticulous Quality Control: You'll establish and maintain exceptional quality standards for our web projects, implementing processes to catch issues early and ensure pixel-perfect execution. You'll own the accuracy and quality of our development team's work while maintaining a critical eye for detail.
  • Advanced Project Leadership: You'll effectively manage multiple complex projects simultaneously, establishing priorities, identifying dependencies, and coordinating with stakeholders to ensure on-time delivery. You'll develop project frameworks, estimate timelines accurately, and adapt to changing requirements while maintaining quality and deadlines.
  • Data-Driven Problem Solving: You'll leverage analytics and performance metrics to identify opportunities for improvement and solve complex problems. You'll apply your deep understanding of marketing metrics and KPIs to optimize website performance, and you'll lead process improvements that enhance efficiency and quality.
  • Strategic Digital Marketing Integration: You'll understand how websites fit into the broader digital marketing ecosystem, ensuring our solutions support SEO, PPC, content, and social strategies. You'll anticipate how website changes might impact other marketing channels and make recommendations that balance all factors.
  • Proactive Leadership: You'll take ownership of your projects from conception to completion, identifying potential roadblocks before they arise and developing solutions independently. You'll drive continual improvement in our development practices while taking initiative to advance your expertise and the team's capabilities.
  • Commitment to Excellence: You'll set the standard for quality in all deliverables, both large and small. You'll approach each challenge with creativity and thoroughness, continuously raising the bar for what's possible within Webflow development.

Personality Musts:

Our perfect Senior Webflow Developer is a strategic problem solver who leads by example. You should be a dynamic, forward-thinking professional who balances technical expertise with a client-first mindset. You thrive in collaborative environments while maintaining the confidence to make authoritative decisions. Working in client service requires dedication and flexibility; we need someone who inspires their team to go above and beyond for our clients and consistently delivers beautiful work that exceeds expectations. You should be meticulously organized, intrinsically motivated, and passionate about innovation. Strong leadership abilities, emotional intelligence, and genuine curiosity are qualities we value deeply.

Minimum Experience:

  • 3+ years developing advanced websites in the Webflow content management system 
  • Expert knowledge of Webflow site architecture, CMS relationships, and complex interactions 
  • Advanced experience with Lumos, Client-First, Finsweet, and other Webflow frameworks 
  • Comprehensive understanding of other content management systems (CMS) with the ability to migrate from systems such as WordPress, SquareSpace, Duda or Wix
  • Advanced proficiency in HTML, CSS and Javascript with the ability to implement custom code solutions 
  • Experience mentoring junior developers and leading web development initiatives 
  • Demonstrated success in client-facing roles with excellent communication skills 
  • A passion for helping clients and small businesses succeed, with a portfolio of successful projects

Bonus Points for Applicants With:

(if you don't have all of these but have comparable skills and want to grow with us, we want to hear from you!)

  • Leadership experience in high-volume web development within an agency setting 
  • Advanced digital marketing expertise (including technical SEO, conversion optimization, analytics implementation, and marketing automation)

  • Strong UX/UI design background with the ability to translate business requirements into effective user experiences 
  • Knowledge of dental industry or dental services 
  • Experience with version control systems like Git 
  • Familiarity with headless CMS architecture and API integrations 
  • Portfolio demonstrating complex, high-traffic website implementations

title: Social Media Manager
jobDescription:
As a Social Media Manager, you’ll drive brand awareness, engagement, and organic growth for diverse clients while also supporting Designity’s own social presence when needed. You’ll lead social media strategy, content creation, community engagement, and influencer partnerships, ensuring each brand stands out. Using AI-powered tools for scheduling, trend analysis, and audience insights, you’ll optimize strategies to maximize reach and conversions. This role requires creativity, trend awareness, and strong storytelling abilities to position our clients (including Designity) as bold, out-of-the-box industry leaders.

‍

Designity is a Creative-as-a-Service (CaaS) platform that empowers businesses with a flexible, high-quality, and scalable alternative to traditional agencies and in-house teams.

‍

Our unique model connects marketing and creative leaders with the top 3% of US-based creative and marketing talent, all led by experienced Creative Directors, Project Managers, and Marketing Strategists. Through our collaborative platform, we streamline the creative process, ensuring fast, high-impact execution without the inefficiencies of hiring in-house or the high costs of traditional agencies.

‍

Brands like Calendly, Kung Fu Tea, and Marriott Hotels trust Designity to handle their design and marketing needs—proving that there's a better way to scale creativity. Unlike in-house hiring, which is expensive and skill-limiting, or marketplaces like Upwork and Fiverr, which lack reliability and creative oversight, Designity delivers a seamless, results-driven approach that makes creative collaboration effortless.

‍

PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES:

  • Develop and execute customized social media strategies and create engaging content for LinkedIn, Twitter (X), Instagram, TikTok, and Reedit, ensuring alignment with each brand and target audience.
  • Develop and execute a bold, unconventional social media strategy aligned with clients' and Designity's brand voice and category positioning.
  • Collaborate with designers and content teams to produce compelling assets, videos, and memes, while leading video content creation that focuses on effective storytelling.
  • Experiment with new content formats such as interactive posts, AI-generated content, and live streams to enhance engagement and conversions.
  • Actively engage with audiences through comments, DMs, and mentions, while conducting social listening to track industry trends, competitor activity, and audience sentiment.
  • Build and manage influencer partnerships and develop client-specific campaigns that position them as industry leaders, amplifying executive thought leadership, especially on LinkedIn.
  • Track and analyze follower growth, engagement rates, reach, and conversions and use AI-driven tools to optimize social strategies.

REQUIREMENTS:

  • 5+ years of experience in social media management and content strategy.
  • Proven success in scaling B2B and B2C social media accounts, with measurable results in audience growth, engagement, and conversions.
  • Hands-on experience with AI-powered social media tools for content optimization, audience insights, trend analysis, and automation.
  • Experience with Hubspot and social media analytics tools (Sprout Social, Hootsuite, Buffer, etc.).
  • Strong background in video content creation and managing influencer marketing for diverse brands.
  • Ability to adapt brand voices and create platform-specific content tailored to different client needs.

BENEFITS:

  • Join a company at the perfect moment! Career making opportunity.
  • Work fully remotely full-time, from wherever you are.
  • Unwind during the flexible PTO, and company holidays.
  • Learn and grow with the best by becoming part of our exclusive Design Community.
  • Enjoy dedicated focus times designed to boost your productivity and creativity.
  • ‍

In order to be considered for this position, you need to complete the application process at www.designity.com/careers/social-media-manager

‍

Please do NOT follow up on your application. We will be in touch within 2-3 weeks if you're qualified.

‍

At Designity, employment decisions are based on business needs, qualifications, and merit. We are an Equal Opportunity Employer, valuing diversity in culture, perspectives, skills, and experiences, which strengthens our team, clients, and products.

title: Marketing Funnel Specialist
jobDescription:
At Wonderist Agency, we guarantee you’ll have problems to solve. You’ll be dragged into projects in the 11th hour. And you’ll be expected to create and contribute to our ever-evolving processes. The work isn’t easy. It’s dental. And there’s plenty to go around.

We need an intelligent, creative Marketing Funnel Specialist with the flexibility to turn on their heels when priorities change, the thoughtfulness to do what’s in the best interest of the team, and the desire to always produce your best work. We do what’s right for the client, not just what’s easy. And that’s what makes our jobs gratifying.

We are a fast-growing startup of over 50, and that means we’re agile. We’re able to try new things and experiment. It also means we make time to celebrate the work, each other, and when we hit our quarterly goals, or every Friday at 5pm. Our favorite dive bar, Desi’s, is just down the street and right across from Liberty Station, so we’ve got our location going for us.

Basically, we need someone who’s willing to work really hard and doesn’t get discouraged when a project is going off the rails. So if you’ve got a lot of grit and an equal amount of gumption, keep reading…

Job Description:

Are you interested in working on cutting-edge marketing campaigns to generate consistent leads? The Marketing Funnel Specialist leads the strategy and build-out of clients' funnels in industry-leading funnel software. This person works closely with the Account Management and Paid Ads teams to build successful funnels that generate a lead list from multiple channels, including live chat, call-tracking, social media messaging, Google My Business, and lead forms. This role requires a strong understanding of conversion-focused marketing and relies on catchy offers that motivate leads to provide contact info. The Marketing Funnel Specialist will be responsible for building creative follow-up sequences to nurture leads including SMS, email, pre-recorded voicemails, and more. This person will also have a hand in Wonderist’s internal marketing, building automated lead-nurture campaigns, and distributing content across several platforms with lead generation and lead conversion in top of mind.

Essential Functions:

  • Onboarding: Meet with new and existing clients to establish campaign goals and build campaigns that convert and increase practice lead generation.
  • Campaign Build Out: Learn the technical skills required to build funnels, modify drip sequences, write conversion-focused email/SMS copy, and design landing pages.
  • ​​Cross-Departmental Collaboration: Acts as main point of contact internally for GoHighLevel/WonderFunnels questions or needs, and coordinates cross-departmental initiatives and decision making to ensure the success of each campaign and client account.
  • Project Management: Move projects forward both internally and for clients, setting and following timelines and expectations, prioritizing tasks, and ensuring deadlines are met and clients are satisfied.
  • Marketing Strategy and Lead Gen Management: Build, test, and maintain lead-generating campaigns within GoHighLevel, both internally and for our clients. Identify opportunities and goals for both Wonderist and our client’s campaigns, alongside the corresponding internal teams, matching opportunities with the best strategies to meet their needs.
  • Time and Resource Management: Timetrack projects and tasks and oversee management of internal and external resources to move things forward in a timely manner and have an accurate prediction of when team growth is necessary to keep up with current and upcoming workload.
  • Quality Assurance and Creative Direction: Ensure that all work is high-quality and follows the direction of the client’s practice goals and expectations, and is up to Wonderist’s standards.
  • Goal Setting and Management: Set goals for the SaaS team and strategize how to best manage and achieve them, for the financial benefit and growth of the company. These goals should be actionable, achievable, and include projections for the betterment of both the client’s campaigns and the company’s growth.
  • Campaign Reporting: Lead monthly reporting emails and phone calls, translating marketing metrics and performance KPIs for the internal team to understand the health of the campaigns, and can relay to the client.

Core Competencies:

  • Ownership: You have a strong ownership mentality, always taking responsibility for what’s on your desk, the outcomes, and being empowered to make the decisions that will lead to those outcomes.
  • Leadership: You know the difference between a leader and a manager, and you’ll be able to wear both hats effectively. You are an advocate for your team and the company, while simultaneously recognizing opportunities that challenge your team to be better, faster, stronger.
  • Marketing Mindset: You are able to think creatively and intuitively regarding marketing campaigns and desired outcomes. You put yourself in the customer’s shoes and prioritize marketing needs and developing corresponding strategy to produce the desired results.
  • Task Prioritization/Organization: Ability to prioritize a large volume of client accounts, effectively managing resources to triage their needs for optimal client satisfaction. You will need to make decisions on which tasks and accounts take priority in certain situations.
  • Great Communication: Ability to effectively communicate, both internally with the team and externally with clients, to answer questions and relay information related to the delivery of SEO services and the concepts and strategies underlying them
  • Attention to Detail: Team members and clients will rely on you for accurate data regarding each campaign and account. Strong attention to detail is a must in order to accurately identify and communicate KPIs and campaign performance to others while identifying areas for improvement in individual campaigns.
  • “Big Picture” Thinking and Knowledge of Digital Marketing: While it is not your sole job, clients will ask questions about their campaigns, and every service we offer ties into the next. Having an understanding of how their website is performing, what kind of ads we’re running for them, and how their services are being marketed as a whole is critical to understanding how to achieve success for the client. We need someone who can see the connections and make good choices for both the client and the agency as a whole. We also ask that you’re well versed and seek out changes and evolution in the industry.
  • Takes Pride In Work: We need someone who takes any project, big or small, and puts everything they have into it. Mistakes are okay. Sloppiness is not.
  • Keen Analytical Skills: We measure everything we do by its ROI. You will need a deep understanding of marketing metrics and KPIs, along with the ability to dissect and solve problems through data. This is especially important for projecting future growth for metrics, revenue forecasting, and hiring.
  • Curiosity / Problem Solving: You should have a knack for tinkering and figuring things out, looking at things from all angles inside and out to find a solution. While we are a team and value the ability to ask for help, we need someone who is self-sufficient, curious and is able to figure things out.

Personality Musts:

‍Our perfect fit is someone who is a problem solver who understands the difference between “yes, and…” and “yes, but…”. You should be a hungry, scrappy personality with a positive attitude and aims to deliver. Working in the client service industry can mean going the extra mile, and we need someone who is always willing to rise to the occasion for our clients and strives to put forward beautiful work that exceeds client expectations. Someone who is detailed and organized, driven and displays vigor and comes ready to play every day. Confidence, self-discipline, and a congenial, curious mind are things we love and admire.

Minimum Qualifications:

  • Strong figure-it-out mentality
  • Strong writing and editing skills
  • Experience writing copy for marketing and conversion
  • End-to-end marketing lead funnel setup and implementation
  • Expert understanding of drip campaigns and how to implement them
  • Eye for web design and general design ratios
  • Strong communication skills in team and client settings
  • Landing page development and implementation
  • Understanding of Social and PPC Ads reporting and implementation
  • Graphic design experience
  • Experience analyzing marketing analytics and tracking campaign performance

Minimum Experience:

  • 2 years

Personality Musts:

  • Our perfect fit is someone who is a problem solver who understands the difference between “yes, and…” and “yes, but…”. You should be a hungry, scrappy personality with a positive attitude and aims to deliver. Working in the client service industry can mean going the extra mile, and we need someone who is always willing to rise to the occasion for our clients and strives to put forward beautiful work that exceeds client expectations. Someone who is detailed and organized, driven and displays vigor and comes ready to play every day. Confidence, self-discipline, and a congenial, curious mind are things we love and admire.

Bonus Points for Applicants With…

(if you don’t have these but are organized and want to learn, we want to hear from you!)

  • GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Hubspot, or Equivalent Experience
  • Photo & Video Editing
  • Web Design
  • Basic HTML Capabilities or Understanding

title: Content Specialist
jobDescription:
Full job description

Description

​

Are you a talented storyteller? Do you have a knack for crafting compelling copy? Do you love dreaming up creative concepts and making them a reality? We’re looking for a skilled Content Writer to join our team! If you answered yes to any of those questions, we'd love for you to apply.

​

In this role, you’ll create engaging content for blogs, social media, websites, and email campaigns, applying your skills as a wordsmith to bring marketing messages to life.

​

We’re seeking someone creative, organized, detail-oriented, and skilled at tailoring their writing to different audiences and platforms. You’ll shape our clients’ content strategies while ensuring consistent quality and brand voice. As part of our team, you'll collaborate closely with graphic designers, SEO specialists, and web developers to build assets for clients and meet project deadlines.

​

If you’re passionate about creating content that informs, entertains, and inspires, we’d love to have you join our content team. This role is an exciting opportunity to contribute to a growing company while honing your skills in a supportive and innovative environment.

​

Apply today. Let’s create captivating content—one word at a time!

​

Essential Duties & Responsibilities

​

Write clear, compelling, and engaging content across multiple digital channels for local, regional, and national brands

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to achieve creative goals and develop key deliverables for client and internal projects, including blogs, email campaigns, social media posts, website content, and brand style guides

Research, write, and optimize blog posts that attract and engage readers while supporting SEO objectives

Take a pivotal role in new website projects, organizing sitemap structures, delivering website copy, and working closely with graphic designers and developers

Create captivating social media content, including captions, hashtags, and multimedia copy, to increase follower engagement and brand visibility

Develop brand messages (taglines, slogans, etc.) that speak to clients’ value propositions in a creative and fresh way

Actively participate in brainstorming sessions to develop innovative ideas and unique campaigns that resonate with target audiences and drive engagement

Stay updated on content trends, social media developments, and digital marketing best practices

Adapt writing style and tone to match diverse brand voices and campaign needs

Ensure all content is delivered on time, adhering to project deadlines and editorial calendars

Prioritize tasks effectively while maintaining high-quality standards

Proofread and edit content for clarity, grammar, and consistency before publication

Monitor content performance and refine strategies based on analytics and feedback

Skills & Qualifications

​

A digital-first mindset and strong understanding of the modern consumer landscape, especially social media, video, mobile web, and advertising channels

Advanced writing and editing skills

Familiarity with Google Analytics, keyword research tools (like SEMrush), email platforms (Klaviyo, Campaign Monitor, etc.) and Meta Business Suite or another social scheduling platform is preferred

Must be team-oriented, possess a positive attitude, and collaborate effectively

Demonstrate strong verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills to express thoughts and concepts to clients and management

An entrepreneurial mindset and willingness to be a hands-on leader

Professional self-starter with strong work ethic who’s detail-oriented

Strong organizational and time management skills with excellent follow-through who thrives in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

Ability to think strategically and problem solve

Flexibility to adjust quickly to changes and deliver on deadline

Ability to work both independently and collaboratively and to successfully manage concurrent and competing projects

Experience

​

Bachelor’s degree in English, communications or equivalent required

3+ years of content creation experience

2+ years of agency-side experience developing content for multiple clients

Compensation & Benefits

Salary range depends on experience

Medical, Dental, Vision and FSA available first of the month after hire

Employee Assistance Program

Retirement plan: 401(k) company match

100% paid maternity and paternity leave up to 16 weeks

2 to 4 weeks paid time off

14 company-paid holidays

Paid continuing education

Diversity is fundamental to our continued success. So it goes without saying (although we’ll say it anyway) that Campaignium is an equal-opportunity employer.

title: SEO Specialist
jobDescription:
At Wonderist Agency, we guarantee you’ll have problems to solve. As a member of Inc. Magazine’s 5000 Fastest Growing Companies, we thrive off of a fast-paced environment that challenges us to provide innovative solutions to our clients. 

We need a skilled SEO Specialist with the flexibility to turn on your heels when priorities change, the thoughtfulness to do what’s in the best interest of the team, and the desire to always produce your best work. We do what’s right for the client, not just what’s easy. And that’s what makes our jobs gratifying. Our rockstar team, dog-friendly office, and transparency from our co-founders are some of the reasons Wonderist Agency has been voted one of San Diego's Best Places to Work and why our Wonderbuds love working here.

We are a fast-growing startup of almost 40, and that means we’re agile. We’re able to try new things and experiment. It also means we make time to celebrate the work, each other when we hit our quarterly goals, or every Friday at 5 pm. Our favorite dive bar, Desi’s, is just down the street and right across from Liberty Station, so we’ve got our location going for us.

Basically, we need someone who’s willing to work really hard and doesn’t get discouraged when a client or project is going off the rails. So if you’ve got a lot of grit and an equal amount of gumption, keep reading...

The SEO Specialist will work to build, manage, optimize and evolve our SEO client accounts. Driving quality conversions for our clients through search engine marketing campaigns is at the heart of this role. Daily tasks will include, but are not be limited to: 

  • Developing and implementing SEO strategies that increase rankings and organic traffic
  • Developing monthly content strategies and adding content to Wordpress and Webflow websites
  • Developing backlink campaigns 
  • Executing onsite optimization
  • Providing campaign analysis and suggesting campaign optimizations 
  • Reviewing campaigns with clients via phone calls and email
  • Working with other departments at Wonderist Agency to provide a holistic approach to SEO and your clients’ online presence. 

Essential Functions:

  • Knowledge of SEO Strategy and Best Practices: Deep understanding of search engine optimization, ranking factors, and digital marketing principles. You should be able to showcase SEO knowledge including on-page optimization, linkbuilding, schema markup, local listings and Google’s algorithm.
  • Knowledge of Google Analytics: Familiarity with the Google Analytics platform and how to set up new accounts and goal tracking. A deep understanding of Google Analytics is crucial to succeeding in this role. Google Analytics Certification is required.
  • Website Optimization & Updates: Our team works primarily in Webflow and Wordpress CMS. You will be expected to understand how these platforms operate and how to best optimize web pages to increase rankings and SEO value.
  • SEO Content Strategy: Strategically formulate new topic ideas and optimize that content before adding it to client websites, as well as updating existing client website copy to help it perform better.
  • Client Campaign Management: You will be expected to oversee and manage your client accounts to ensure they are performing adequately. You will report on client account performance each month and make recommendations on how to improve client performance.
  • Project & Time Management: You will be required to manage your time wisely and complete tasks on time. You will act as your own project coordinator to drive your client project through to the finish line. 
  • Data Analyzation: Ability to analyze data to find insights, affect strategy, and create new processes that can be efficiently implemented to improve clients’ SEO performance.
  • Client Communication: You will be expected to lead SEO discussions in client kick-off calls, onboarding meetings and other client communications when necessary. You will be brought in to assist Account Management and other departments in client communications involving in-depth SEO topics.

Core Competencies:

  • Strong Communication: You will be a client’s primary point of contact and responsible for relaying updates to our team; you must be personable, professional, and responsive. There is an intuition needed in this role to differentiate between moments when an email will suffice and when you need to pick up the phone.
  • Obsessive Attention to Detail: SEO Specialists are the driving force behind our client’s organic search results and therefore need to be extremely detail oriented. You will share accountability for the accuracy and quality of our company’s work. Attention to detail is crucial, so please include the title of your favorite movie or book at the beginning of your email or application.‍
  • Expert Organization and Project Management: If someone asks you to describe yourself and you wouldn't say "organized," you need not apply. SEO Specialists must be organized and on top of all client needs, acting as a project manager to oversee deadlines and facilitate deliverables. You will need an exceptionally strong ability to multitask and prioritize accordingly, keeping track of outstanding assets and tasks.‍
  • Keen Analytical Skills: We measure everything we do by its ROI. You will need a deep understanding of marketing metrics and KPIs, along with the ability to dissect and solve problems through data. You will supervise your clients’ campaign performance and you are able to determine when it’s time to pivot away from efforts that aren’t fruitful vs. when to double down on a campaign with killer ROI.‍
  • Resourceful and Confident Self-Starter: Once you learn the ropes, we’ll expect you to own your tasks and hold yourself accountable. You will solve problems every single day, so we need someone with a solutions-oriented mind.‍
  • Forward Thinker With Fresh Ideas: As SEO Specialists, we know that Google’s algorithm is constantly changing. We need people on our team who take time to research these changes and develop new ways we can advance our client’s performance. Our team’s innovation and flexibility is what makes Wonderist stand out from the competition.‍
  • Takes Pride In Work: We need someone who takes any project, big or small, and puts everything they have into it. Mistakes are okay. Sloppiness is not.

Personality Musts:

Our perfect fit is someone who is a problem solver who understands the difference between “yes, and…” and “yes, but…”. You should be a hungry, scrappy personality with a positive attitude and aims to deliver. Working in the client service industry can mean going the extra mile, and we need someone who is always willing to rise to the occasion for our clients and strives to put forward beautiful work that exceeds client expectations. Someone who is detailed and organized, driven and displays vigor and comes ready to play every day. Confidence, self-discipline, and a congenial, curious mind are things we love and admire.

Minimum Qualifications:

  • 2+ years of marketing or agency experience OR equivalent 
  • Prior SEO experience

Bonus Points for Applicants With:

(if you don’t have these but are organized and want to learn, we want to hear from you!)

  • Google Analytics Certified
  • Hands on experience with Webflow or Wordpress
